---
title: "LIM - analysis of results (montane)"
author: "Ceres Barros"
date: "26/04/2021"
output: html_document
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "D:/GitHub/LandscapesInMotion/")
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, cache = 2, warning = FALSE,
                      fig.width = 10, fig.height = 8)
```

```{r setup2, include=FALSE}
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(ggspatial)
library(cowplot)
library(raster)
library(stars)
library(sf)
library(quickPlot)
library(SpaDES)
library(qs)
library(purrr)
library(magick)
library(LandR)
library(future)
library(future.apply)
library(lme4)
library(MuMIn)
library(ToolsCB)

source("R/R_tools/convertToCNVegType.R")
source("R/R_tools/hypervolumesHelpers.R")
source("R/R_tools/Useful_functions.R")
options("reproducible.useNewDigestAlgorithm" = 2)
options("spades.moduleCodeChecks" = FALSE)
options("reproducible.useCache" = TRUE)
options("reproducible.destinationPath" = normPath("R/SpaDES/inputs"))
options("reproducible.useGDAL" = FALSE)


## general paths
simDirName <- "jun2021Runs"
simPaths <- list(cachePath = file.path("R/SpaDES/cache", simDirName)
                 , modulePath = file.path("R/SpaDES/m")
                 , inputPath = file.path("R/SpaDES/inputs")
                 , outputPath = file.path("R/SpaDES/outputs", simDirName))

## path to figure folder and cache folder
figOutputPath <- file.path(simPaths$outputPath, "figuresAnalysis/Montane")
cPath <- file.path(simPaths$cachePath, "postSimAnalyses")

## merge Douglas-fir/dry-conifer stands?
## no need with last year classif
mergeDMCPSME <- FALSE  ## merge DMCPSME PSME dryPSME
mergePSME <- TRUE ## merge PSME dryPSME
if (mergeDMCPSME) {
  figOutputPath <- file.path(simPaths$outputPath, "figuresAnalysis/Montane/mergeDMCPSME")
  HVoutputPathMergedVegType <- file.path(simPaths$outputPath, "hypervolumes", "mergeDMCPSME")
}
if (mergePSME) {
  HVoutputPathMergedVegType <- file.path(simPaths$outputPath, "hypervolumes", "mergePSME")
  figOutputPath <- file.path(simPaths$outputPath, "figuresAnalysis/Montane/mergePSME")
}
dir.create(figOutputPath, recursive = TRUE)
```

### DATA LOADING AND PROCESSING NOTES
Given the size of the data put together in a pixel-based format, results were sampled every 10 years (instead of the 5-year interval used for saving),

```{r dataPrep, include = FALSE, cache = FALSE}
yearSubset <- c(seq(2011, 2111, 5), 2111)

source("R/SpaDES/6_resultsDataPrep.R")

startYear <- min(yearSubset)
endYear <- max(yearSubset)

## check
if (endYear != max(allPixelCohortDataMnt$year, na.rm = TRUE)) {
  stop("endYear and max(year) differ")
}
if (startYear != min(allPixelCohortDataMnt$year, na.rm = TRUE)) {
  stop("startYear and min(year) differ")
}

if (mergeDMCPSME) {
  allPixelCohortDataMnt[vegTypeCN %in% c("DMCPSME", "PSME", "dryPSME"), vegTypeCN := "DMCPSME"]
  ageDataCN[Cover.dendro %in% c("DMCPSME", "PSME", "dryPSME"), Cover.dendro := "DMCPSME"]
}

if (mergePSME) {
  allPixelCohortDataMnt[vegTypeCN %in% c("PSME", "dryPSME"), vegTypeCN := "PSME"]
  ageDataCN[Cover.dendro %in% c("PSME", "dryPSME"), Cover.dendro := "PSME"]
}

## add vegTypes at the initial year - these are the ones we track in time, the final year may have changed completely -
## and pixels with no fires to burn data - note that we loose the yearly fire data.
allPixelBurnData <- allPixelBurnData[unique(allPixelCohortDataMnt[year == endYear, 
                                                                  .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex, vegTypeCN)]), 
                                     on = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex)]
cols <- c("fireID", "noFires", "severity", "severityB", "fireSize", "patchSize", "fireInt", "fireFreq")
allPixelBurnData[, (cols) := lapply(.SD, replaceNAs), .SDcols = cols]

## summarise fire data
source("R/R_tools/prepFireData4HVs.R")

## drop unused levels
allPixelBurnData$vegTypeCN <- droplevels(allPixelBurnData$vegTypeCN)
allPixelCohortDataMnt$vegTypeCN <- droplevels(allPixelCohortDataMnt$vegTypeCN)
summaryFireAttributes$vegTypeCN <- droplevels(summaryFireAttributes$vegTypeCN)

## get HV data
HVoutputPath <- file.path(simPaths$outputPath, "hypervolumes")
source("R/R_tools/prepHVData.R")
```

```{r summaryTables, cache=FALSE, include=FALSE}
## SUMMARY ACROSS LANDSCAPE -----------------------------------
## BY SPECIES
## remember that biomass is multiplied by 100 in *boreal*, this will revert the units to tonnes/ha
summaryBurnCohortDataSpp <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[, list(BiomassBySpecies = as.numeric(sum((B/100), na.rm = TRUE)),
                                                         MortalityBySpecies = as.numeric(sum((mortality/100), na.rm = TRUE)),
                                                         aNPPBySpecies = as.numeric(sum((aNPPAct/100), na.rm = TRUE)),
                                                         AgeBySppWeighted = as.numeric(sum(age * (B/100), na.rm = TRUE) /
                                                                                         sum((B/100), na.rm = TRUE))),
                                                  by = .(scenario, rep, year, noFires, speciesCode)]
summaryBurnCohortDataSpp[is.nan(AgeBySppWeighted), AgeBySppWeighted := 0]
summaryBurnCohortDataSpp[, firePresAbs := as.integer(noFires != 0)]
amc::.gc()

## BY FOREST TYPE (def. as dominant species)
## remember that biomass is multiplied by 100 in *boreal*, this will revert the units to tonnes/ha
summaryBurnCohortDataVegType <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[, list(BiomassByVegType = as.numeric(sum((B/100), na.rm = TRUE)),
                                                             MortalityByVegType = as.numeric(sum((mortality/100), na.rm = TRUE)),
                                                             aNPPByVegType = as.numeric(sum((aNPPAct/100), na.rm = TRUE)),
                                                             AgeBySppWeighted = as.numeric(sum(age * (B/100), na.rm = TRUE) /
                                                                                             sum((B/100), na.rm = TRUE))),
                                                      by = .(scenario, rep, year, noFires, vegType)]
summaryBurnCohortDataVegType[is.nan(AgeBySppWeighted), AgeBySppWeighted := 0]
summaryBurnCohortDataVegType[, firePresAbs := as.integer(noFires != 0)]
amc::.gc()

## BY CAMERON'S VEG TYPE
summaryBurnCohortDataVegTypeCN <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[, list(BiomassByVegType = as.numeric(sum((B/100), na.rm = TRUE)),
                                                               MortalityByVegType = as.numeric(sum((mortality/100), na.rm = TRUE)),
                                                               aNPPByVegType = as.numeric(sum((aNPPAct/100), na.rm = TRUE)),
                                                               AgeBySppWeighted = as.numeric(sum(age * (B/100), na.rm = TRUE) /
                                                                                               sum((B/100), na.rm = TRUE))),
                                                        by = .(scenario, rep, year, noFires, vegTypeCN)]
summaryBurnCohortDataVegTypeCN[is.nan(AgeBySppWeighted), AgeBySppWeighted := 0]
summaryBurnCohortDataVegTypeCN[, firePresAbs := as.integer(noFires != 0)]
amc::.gc()
```

```{r plotLabels, include = FALSE}
source("R/R_tools/plotLabels&Cols.R")

## filter labellers/colors according to the data
# uniqueVegTypeCN <- c(unique(allPixelCohortDataMnt$vegTypeCN), unique(ageDataCN$Cover.dendro))
# vegTypeCNColours <- vegTypeCNColours[uniqueVegTypeCN]
# vegTypeCNLabels <- vegTypeCNLabels[uniqueVegTypeCN]
# 
# vegTypeColours <- vegTypeColours[unique(allPixelCohortDataMnt$vegType)]
# vegTypeLabels <- vegTypeLabels[unique(allPixelCohortDataMnt$vegType)]
# 
# speciesColours <- speciesColours[unique(allPixelCohortDataMnt$speciesCode)]
# speciesLabels <- speciesLabels[unique(allPixelCohortDataMnt$speciesCode)]

## remove large objs rasters to save memory
rm(list = c(grep("Stk", ls(), value = TRUE), "allPixelCohortData"))
amc::.gc()
```

### TESTING DIFFERENCES BETWEEN OBSERVED AND SIMULATED DATA
AGES
At the end of the simulation, by species
```{r testAges}
## STAT TESTS ------------------------------------------
## AGE SIM VS OBS ----
## comparing simulated and observed ages - end of sim
## ages compared at the species-level, rather than veg type given that some veg types in the sims don't exist
## in the obs data and this would lead to data loss
plotData <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[year == endYear & B > 0,  ## absences can't lower the average ages
                                  list(AgeBySppWeighted = as.numeric(sum(age * (B/100), na.rm = TRUE) /
                                                                       sum((B/100), na.rm = TRUE))),
                                  by = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex, firePresAbs, speciesCode)]
## observed ages
plotData2 <- copy(ageDataCN[, .(Species, Reconstructed.age, firePresAbs)])
plotData2[grepl("POBA|POTR", Species), speciesCode := "Popu_sp"]  ## collapse populus
plotData2[grepl("ABLA", Species), speciesCode := "Abie_sp"]
plotData2[grepl("PIEN", Species), speciesCode := "Pice_eng"]
plotData2[grepl("PICO", Species), speciesCode := "Pinu_sp"]
plotData2[grepl("PSME", Species), speciesCode := "Pseu_men"]
plotData2 <- plotData2[!is.na(speciesCode)]

plotData2 <- plotData2[, list(avgAgeBySppObs = mean(Reconstructed.age, na.rm = TRUE)), 
                       by = .(speciesCode, firePresAbs)]

## join simulated and observed
plotData2 <- plotData2[plotData, on = .(speciesCode, firePresAbs)]
plotData2[, firePresAbs := as.factor(firePresAbs)]
plotData2[, ageDiffSimObs := AgeBySppWeighted - avgAgeBySppObs]
plotData2 <- plotData2[!is.na(ageDiffSimObs)]

plotData2 <- plotData2[!is.na(ageDiffSimObs)]
ageDiffLMList <- lapply(split(plotData2, by = "firePresAbs"), function(DT) {
  # lm(abs(abs(ageDiffSimObs)) ~ scenario * speciesCode, data = DT)
  nlme::gls(abs(abs(ageDiffSimObs)) ~ scenario * speciesCode, weights = nlme::varIdent(form = ~1|speciesCode),
            data = DT)   ## better AIC and residuals
})

plotData2[firePresAbs == "0", 
          pred := predict(ageDiffLMList$`0`, type = "response")]
plotData2[firePresAbs == "1", 
          pred := predict(ageDiffLMList$`1`, type = "response")]
if (isFALSE(class(ageDiffLMList$`0`) == "gls")) {
  plotData2[firePresAbs == "0", 
            predSE := predict(ageDiffLMList$`0`, type = "response", se = TRUE)["se.fit"]]
}

if (isFALSE(class(ageDiffLMList$`1`) == "gls")) {
  plotData2[firePresAbs == "1", 
            predSE := predict(ageDiffLMList$`1`, type = "response", se = TRUE)["se.fit"]]
}


plotTest1 <- ggplot(plotData2, aes(x = firePresAbs)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(y = abs(ageDiffSimObs), fill = scenario)) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("0" = "no fire", "1" = "fire")) +
  scale_fill_discrete(labels = scenLabels) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  labs(title = "Avg. differences from observed ages",
       y = expression(bgroup("|", "sim." - bar("obs."), "|")),
       x = "") +
  facet_wrap(~ speciesCode, labeller = labeller(speciesCode = speciesLabels))

plotTest1.2 <- ggplot(plotData2, aes(x = firePresAbs)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(y = abs(ageDiffSimObs), fill = scenario)) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("0" = "no fire", "1" = "fire")) +
  scale_fill_discrete(labels = scenLabels) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  labs(title = "Avg. differences from observed ages",
       y = expression(bgroup("|", "sim." - bar("obs."), "|")),
       x = "")
```

```{r plot&savePlots, echo = FALSE}
plotSave <- ggarrange(plotTest1, 
                      plotTest1.2, common.legend = TRUE,
                      labels = "auto", font.label = list(size = 20),
                      widths = c(1, 0.6))
plotSave
ggsave(plot = plotSave, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "results_ageSimVsObsTest.tiff"),
       width = 14, height = 7)
rm(plotTest1)  ## plotTest1.2 is used again later
gc()
```

## SCENARIO LIKELIHOOD
!!! THIS IS WRONG - can't use likelihoods in this context, varying numbers of parameters
### Species B-weighted ages
```{r likelihoodAgeSpp, echo = FALSE, eval = FALSE}
spAgeSim <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[year == endYear & B > 0,  ## absences can't lower the average ages
                                  list(AgeBySppWeighted = as.numeric(sum(age * (B/100), na.rm = TRUE) /
                                                                       sum((B/100), na.rm = TRUE))),
                                  by = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex, firePresAbs, speciesCode)]

spAgeObs <- copy(ageDataCN[, .(Species, Reconstructed.age, firePresAbs)])
spAgeObs[grepl("POBA|POTR", Species), speciesCode := "Popu_sp"]  ## collapse populus
spAgeObs[grepl("ABLA", Species), speciesCode := "Abie_sp"]
spAgeObs[grepl("PIEN", Species), speciesCode := "Pice_eng"]
spAgeObs[grepl("PICO", Species), speciesCode := "Pinu_sp"]
spAgeObs[grepl("PSME", Species), speciesCode := "Pseu_men"]
spAgeObs <- spAgeObs[!is.na(speciesCode)]

## calculate log sim age 
if (any(spAgeSim$AgeBySppWeighted == 0) | any(spAgeObs$Reconstructed.age == 0)) {
  warnings("there are zero ages, which can't be logged. Removing ages = 0 ")
  spAgeSim <- spAgeSim[AgeBySppWeighted > 0]
  spAgeObs <- spAgeObs[Reconstructed.age > 0]
}

spAgeSim[, logAgeBySppWeighted := log(AgeBySppWeighted)]

## calculate log obs age and mean/sd
obslogMeanSD <- cbind(spAgeObs, data.table(logReconstructed.age = log(spAgeObs$Reconstructed.age)))
obslogMeanSD <- obslogMeanSD[, list(mean = mean(logReconstructed.age, na.rm = TRUE), 
                                    sd = sd(logReconstructed.age, na.rm = TRUE)),
                             by = .(speciesCode, firePresAbs)]

combos <- unique(spAgeSim[, .(scenario, rep, speciesCode, firePresAbs)])
negSumLogliks <- apply(as.data.frame(combos), 1, FUN = function(combo, spAgeSim, obslogMeanSD) {
  combo <- as.data.table(as.list(combo))
  cols <- c("rep", "firePresAbs")
  combo[, (cols) := lapply(.SD, as.numeric), .SDcols = cols] 
  
  ## subset data
  simData <- spAgeSim[combo, on = names(combo)]
  cols <- intersect(names(obslogMeanSD), names(combo))
  obsData <- obslogMeanSD[combo[, ..cols], on = cols]
  if (is.na(obsData$mean)) {
    message(paste("no observed data for:", paste(combo, collapse = " ")))
    return(cbind(combo, data.table(SNLL = NA)))
  } else {
    logLiks <- dlnorm(x = simData$logAgeBySppWeighted, meanlog = obsData$mean, sdlog = obsData$sd, log = TRUE)
    return(cbind(combo, data.table(SNLL = -sum(logLiks))))
  }
}, obslogMeanSD = obslogMeanSD, spAgeSim = spAgeSim)

SNLLAgeSp <- rbindlist(negSumLogliks)
SNLLAgeSp[, mean(SNLL, na.rm = TRUE), by = .(scenario)]
SNLLAgeSp[, mean(SNLL, na.rm = TRUE), by = .(speciesCode, scenario)]

```

### Forest type B-weighted ages
```{r likelihoodAgeVegTypeCN, echo = FALSE, eval = FALSE}
spAgeSim <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[year == endYear & B > 0,  ## absences can't lower the average ages
                                  list(AgeBySppWeighted = as.numeric(sum(age * (B/100), na.rm = TRUE) /
                                                                       sum((B/100), na.rm = TRUE))),
                                  by = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex, firePresAbs, vegTypeCN)]

spAgeObs <- copy(ageDataCN[, .(Cover.dendro, Reconstructed.age, firePresAbs)])
setnames(spAgeObs, "Cover.dendro", "vegTypeCN")

## calculate log sim age 
if (any(spAgeSim$AgeBySppWeighted == 0) | any(spAgeObs$Reconstructed.age == 0)) {
  warnings("there are zero ages, which can't be logged. Removing ages = 0 ")
  spAgeSim <- spAgeSim[AgeBySppWeighted > 0]
  spAgeObs <- spAgeObs[Reconstructed.age > 0]
}

spAgeSim[, logAgeBySppWeighted := log(AgeBySppWeighted)]

## calculate log obs age and mean/sd
obslogMeanSD <- cbind(spAgeObs, data.table(logReconstructed.age = log(spAgeObs$Reconstructed.age)))
obslogMeanSD <- obslogMeanSD[, list(mean = mean(logReconstructed.age, na.rm = TRUE), 
                                    sd = sd(logReconstructed.age, na.rm = TRUE)),
                             by = .(vegTypeCN, firePresAbs)]

combos <- unique(spAgeSim[, .(scenario, rep, vegTypeCN, firePresAbs)])
negSumLogliks <- apply(as.data.frame(combos), 1, FUN = function(combo, spAgeSim, obslogMeanSD) {
  combo <- as.data.table(as.list(combo))
  cols <- c("rep", "firePresAbs")
  combo[, (cols) := lapply(.SD, as.numeric), .SDcols = cols] 
  
  ## subset data
  simData <- spAgeSim[combo, on = names(combo)]
  cols <- intersect(names(obslogMeanSD), names(combo))
  obsData <- obslogMeanSD[combo[, ..cols], on = cols]
  if (is.na(obsData$mean)) {
    message(paste("no observed data for:", paste(combo, collapse = " ")))
    return(cbind(combo, data.table(SNLL = NA)))
  } else {
    logLiks <- dlnorm(x = simData$logAgeBySppWeighted, meanlog = obsData$mean, sdlog = obsData$sd, log = TRUE)
    return(cbind(combo, data.table(SNLL = -sum(logLiks))))
  }
}, obslogMeanSD = obslogMeanSD, spAgeSim = spAgeSim)

SNLLAgeVegTypeCN <- rbindlist(negSumLogliks)
SNLLAgeVegTypeCN[, mean(SNLL, na.rm = TRUE), by = .(scenario)]
SNLLAgeVegTypeCN[, mean(SNLL, na.rm = TRUE), by = .(vegTypeCN, scenario)]
```

### Species no. cohorts
```{r likelihoodCohortsSpp, echo = FALSE, eval = FALSE}
spCohortSim <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[year == endYear & B > 0 & vegTypeCN %in% unique(ageDataCN$Cover.dendro),
                                     list(noCohorts = length(unique(age))),
                                     by = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex, firePresAbs, speciesCode)]

spCohortObs <- copy(ageDataCN[, .(Species, noCohorts, firePresAbs)])
spCohortObs[grepl("POBA|POTR", Species), speciesCode := "Popu_sp"]  ## collapse populus
spCohortObs[grepl("ABLA", Species), speciesCode := "Abie_sp"]
spCohortObs[grepl("PIEN", Species), speciesCode := "Pice_eng"]
spCohortObs[grepl("PICO", Species), speciesCode := "Pinu_sp"]
spCohortObs[grepl("PSME", Species), speciesCode := "Pseu_men"]
spCohortObs <- spCohortObs[!is.na(speciesCode)]

## calculate log sim no Cohorts 
if (any(spCohortSim$noCohorts == 0) | any(spCohortObs$noCohorts == 0)) {
  warnings("there are zero noCohorts, which can't be logged. Removing noCohorts = 0 ")
  spCohortSim <- spCohortSim[noCohorts > 0]
  spCohortObs <- spCohortObs[noCohorts > 0]
}

spCohortSim[, logNoCohorts := log(noCohorts)]

## calculate log obs age and mean/sd
obslogMeanSD <- cbind(spCohortObs, data.table(logNoCohorts = log(spCohortObs$noCohorts)))
obslogMeanSD <- obslogMeanSD[, list(mean = mean(logNoCohorts, na.rm = TRUE), 
                                    sd = sd(logNoCohorts, na.rm = TRUE)),
                             by = .(speciesCode, firePresAbs)]

combos <- unique(spCohortSim[, .(scenario, rep, speciesCode, firePresAbs)])
negSumLogliks <- apply(as.data.frame(combos), 1, FUN = function(combo, spCohortSim, obslogMeanSD) {
  combo <- as.data.table(as.list(combo))
  cols <- c("rep", "firePresAbs")
  combo[, (cols) := lapply(.SD, as.numeric), .SDcols = cols] 
  
  ## subset data
  simData <- spCohortSim[combo, on = names(combo)]
  cols <- intersect(names(obslogMeanSD), names(combo))
  obsData <- obslogMeanSD[combo[, ..cols], on = cols]
  if (is.na(obsData$mean)) {
    message(paste("no observed data for:", paste(combo, collapse = " ")))
    return(cbind(combo, data.table(SNLL = NA)))
  } else {
    logLiks <- dlnorm(x = simData$logNoCohorts, meanlog = obsData$mean, sdlog = obsData$sd, log = TRUE)
    return(cbind(combo, data.table(SNLL = -sum(logLiks))))
  }
}, obslogMeanSD = obslogMeanSD, spCohortSim = spCohortSim)

SNLLCohortSp <- rbindlist(negSumLogliks)
SNLLCohortSp[, mean(SNLL, na.rm = TRUE), by = .(scenario)]
```

### Forest type no. cohorts
```{r likelihoodCohortsVegTypeCN, echo = FALSE, eval = FALSE}
spCohortSim <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[year == endYear & B > 0 & vegTypeCN %in% unique(ageDataCN$Cover.dendro),
                                     list(noCohorts = length(unique(age))),
                                     by = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex, firePresAbs, vegTypeCN)]

spCohortObs <- copy(ageDataCN[, .(Cover.dendro, noCohorts, firePresAbs)])
setnames(spCohortObs, "Cover.dendro", "vegTypeCN")

## calculate log sim no Cohorts 
if (any(spCohortSim$noCohorts == 0) | any(spCohortObs$noCohorts == 0)) {
  warnings("there are zero noCohorts, which can't be logged. Removing noCohorts = 0 ")
  spCohortSim <- spCohortSim[noCohorts > 0]
  spCohortObs <- spCohortObs[noCohorts > 0]
}

spCohortSim[, logNoCohorts := log(noCohorts)]

## calculate log obs age and mean/sd
obslogMeanSD <- cbind(spCohortObs, data.table(logNoCohorts = log(spCohortObs$noCohorts)))
obslogMeanSD <- obslogMeanSD[, list(mean = mean(logNoCohorts, na.rm = TRUE), 
                                    sd = sd(logNoCohorts, na.rm = TRUE)),
                             by = .(vegTypeCN, firePresAbs)]

combos <- unique(spCohortSim[, .(scenario, rep, vegTypeCN, firePresAbs)])
negSumLogliks <- apply(as.data.frame(combos), 1, FUN = function(combo, spCohortSim, obslogMeanSD) {
  combo <- as.data.table(as.list(combo))
  cols <- c("rep", "firePresAbs")
  combo[, (cols) := lapply(.SD, as.numeric), .SDcols = cols] 
  
  ## subset data
  simData <- spCohortSim[combo, on = names(combo)]
  cols <- intersect(names(obslogMeanSD), names(combo))
  obsData <- obslogMeanSD[combo[, ..cols], on = cols]
  if (is.na(obsData$mean)) {
    message(paste("no observed data for:", paste(combo, collapse = " ")))
    return(cbind(combo, data.table(SNLL = NA)))
  } else {
    logLiks <- dlnorm(x = simData$logNoCohorts, meanlog = obsData$mean, sdlog = obsData$sd, log = TRUE)
    return(cbind(combo, data.table(SNLL = -sum(logLiks))))
  }
}, obslogMeanSD = obslogMeanSD, spCohortSim = spCohortSim)

SNLLCohortTypeCN <- rbindlist(negSumLogliks)
SNLLCohortTypeCN[, mean(SNLL, na.rm = TRUE), by = .(scenario)]
SNLLCohortTypeCN[, mean(SNLL, na.rm = TRUE), by = .(vegTypeCN, scenario)]
```

### Forest type mean fire interval
```{r likelihoodFIVegTypeCN, echo = FALSE, eval = FALSE}
spFISim <- summaryFireAttributes
spFIObs <- copy(ageDataCN[, .(Cover.dendro, mean.FI)])
setnames(spFIObs, "Cover.dendro", "vegTypeCN")

## calculate obs meanFI and mean/sd
obsMeanSD <- spFIObs[, list(mean = mean(mean.FI, na.rm = TRUE), 
                            sd = sd(mean.FI, na.rm = TRUE)),
                     by = .(vegTypeCN)]

combos <- unique(spFISim[, .(scenario, rep, vegTypeCN)])
negSumLogliks <- apply(as.data.frame(combos), 1, FUN = function(combo, spFISim, obsMeanSD) {
  combo <- as.data.table(as.list(combo))
  cols <- c("rep")
  combo[, (cols) := lapply(.SD, as.numeric), .SDcols = cols] 
  
  ## subset data
  simData <- spFISim[combo, on = names(combo)]
  cols <- intersect(names(obsMeanSD), names(combo))
  obsData <- obsMeanSD[combo[, ..cols], on = cols]
  if (is.na(obsData$mean)) {
    message(paste("no observed data for:", paste(combo, collapse = " ")))
    return(cbind(combo, data.table(SNLL = NA)))
  } else {
    logLiks <- dexp(x = simData$meanFreq, rate = obsData$mean, log = TRUE)
    return(cbind(combo, data.table(SNLL = -sum(logLiks))))
  }
}, obsMeanSD = obsMeanSD, spFISim = spFISim)

SNLLFITypeCN <- rbindlist(negSumLogliks)
SNLLFITypeCN[, mean(SNLL, na.rm = TRUE), by = .(scenario)]
SNLLFITypeCN[, mean(SNLL, na.rm = TRUE), by = .(vegTypeCN, scenario)]
```

## SCENARIO EFFECTS ON STAND AGE, ALPHA DIVERSITY AND BETA DIVERSITY
### Across the landscape in pixels with/without fire
```{r age_scenario}
## SCENARIO EFFECTS ON STAND AGE------
## scenario effects on stand age across landscape
plotData <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[year == endYear,
                                  list(AgeBySppWeighted = as.numeric(sum(age * (B/100), na.rm = TRUE) /
                                                                       sum((B/100), na.rm = TRUE))),
                                  by = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex, firePresAbs, ecoregionGroup)]

plotData[, firePresAbs := as.factor(firePresAbs)]
plotData[, ecoregionGroup := as.factor(ecoregionGroup)]
plotData <- plotData[!is.na(ecoregionGroup) & !is.na(AgeBySppWeighted)]

## some ecoregionGroups only have one observation, leading to signular fit
ageEffectsLMList <- lapply(split(plotData, by = "firePresAbs"), function(DT) {
  lmer(AgeBySppWeighted ~ scenario + (scenario | ecoregionGroup), data = DT)
})
print("No fire")
summary(ageEffectsLMList$`0`)

print("Fire")
summary(ageEffectsLMList$`1`)

## fitted values vector is shorter than nrow, prob. due to signularity. predict using the same data.
plotData[firePresAbs == 0, predVals := predict(ageEffectsLMList$`0`, type = "response",
                                               re.form = NA,
                                               newdata = plotData[firePresAbs == 0])]
plotData[firePresAbs == 1, predVals := predict(ageEffectsLMList$`1`, type = "response",
                                               re.form = NA,
                                               newdata = plotData[firePresAbs == 1])]

plotTest2 <- ggplot(plotData) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(x = firePresAbs, y = AgeBySppWeighted, fill = scenario)) +
  geom_point(aes(x = firePresAbs, y = predVals, colour = scenario),
             position = position_dodge(width = 0.75), size = 2, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, colour = "grey", linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("red", "red")) +
  scale_fill_discrete(labels = scenLabels) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("0" = "no fire", "1" = "fire")) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  labs(y = "biomass-weighted age", x = "")
```

```{r alphaDiv_scenario}
## SCENARIO EFFECTS ON ALPHA DIVERSITY ------------------
## scenario effects on alpha-div across landscape
## inverse Simpson concentration (Whittaker 1972)
plotData <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[year == endYear]
plotData[, sumB := sum(B, na.rm = TRUE),
         by = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex, firePresAbs, ecoregionGroup)]
plotData <- plotData[, list(relB = sum(B, na.rm = TRUE)/sumB),
                     by = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex, speciesCode, firePresAbs, ecoregionGroup)]
plotData <- plotData[, list(alphaDiv = 1/sum(relB^2)),
                     by = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex, firePresAbs, ecoregionGroup)]

plotData[, firePresAbs := as.factor(firePresAbs)]
plotData[, ecoregionGroup := as.factor(ecoregionGroup)]
plotData <- plotData[!is.na(ecoregionGroup) & !is.na(alphaDiv)]

## some ecoregionGroups only have one observation, leading to signular fit
alphaEffectsLMList <- lapply(split(plotData, by = "firePresAbs"), function(DT) {
  lmer(alphaDiv ~ scenario + (scenario | ecoregionGroup), data = DT)
})
summary(alphaEffectsLMList$`1`)

## fitted values vector is shorter than nrow, prob. due to signularity. predict using the same data.
plotData[firePresAbs == 0, predVals := predict(alphaEffectsLMList$`0`, type = "response",
                                               re.form = NA,
                                               newdata = plotData[firePresAbs == 0])]
plotData[firePresAbs == 1, predVals := predict(alphaEffectsLMList$`1`, type = "response",
                                               re.form = NA,
                                               newdata = plotData[firePresAbs == 1])]

plotTest3 <- ggplot(plotData) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(x = firePresAbs, y = alphaDiv, fill = scenario)) +
  geom_point(aes(x = firePresAbs, y = predVals, colour = scenario),
             position = position_dodge(width = 0.75), size = 2, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, colour = "grey", linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("red", "red")) +
  scale_fill_discrete(labels = scenLabels) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("0" = "no fire", "1" = "fire")) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  labs(y = "alpha-div.", x = "")
```

```{r betaDiv_scenario}
## SCENARIO EFFECTS ON BETA DIVERSITY ------------------
## scenario effects on beta-div across landscape - with fire vs. no fire
## from multiplicative decomposition where both alpha
## and gamma diversity are inverse Simpson concentration (Whittaker 1972)
# alpha-div
plotData <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[year == endYear]
plotData[, sumB := sum(B, na.rm = TRUE),
         by = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex, firePresAbs, ecoregionGroup)]
plotData <- plotData[, list(relB = sum(B, na.rm = TRUE)/sumB),
                     by = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex, speciesCode, firePresAbs, ecoregionGroup)]
plotData <- plotData[, list(alphaDiv = 1/sum(relB^2)),
                     by = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex, firePresAbs, ecoregionGroup)]

## gamma-div
plotData2 <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[year == endYear,
                                   list(BiomassBySpecies = sum(B, na.rm = TRUE)),
                                   by = .(scenario, rep, firePresAbs, speciesCode, ecoregionGroup)]
plotData2[, sumB := sum(BiomassBySpecies, na.rm = TRUE),
          .(scenario, rep, firePresAbs, ecoregionGroup)]
plotData2 <- plotData2[, list(relB = sum(BiomassBySpecies, na.rm = TRUE)/sumB),
                       by = .(scenario, rep, firePresAbs, speciesCode, ecoregionGroup)]
plotData2 <- plotData2[, list(gammaDiv = 1/sum(relB^2)),
                       by = .(scenario, rep, firePresAbs, ecoregionGroup)]

## beta-div
plotData2 <- plotData2[plotData, on = .(scenario, rep, firePresAbs, ecoregionGroup)]
plotData2 <- plotData2[, list(betaDiv = gammaDiv * sum((1/.N) * (1/alphaDiv), na.rm = TRUE)),
                       by = .(scenario, rep, firePresAbs, ecoregionGroup)]

plotData2[, firePresAbs := as.factor(firePresAbs)]
plotData2[, ecoregionGroup := as.factor(ecoregionGroup)]
plotData2 <- unique(plotData2[!is.na(ecoregionGroup) & !is.na(betaDiv)])

## some ecoregionGroups only have one observation, leading to signular fit
betaEffectsLMList <- lapply(split(plotData2, by = "firePresAbs"), function(DT) {
  lmer(betaDiv ~ scenario + (1|ecoregionGroup), data = DT)
})
summary(betaEffectsLMList$`1`)

## fitted values vector is shorter than nrow, prob. due to signularity. predict using the same data.
plotData2[firePresAbs == 0, predVals := predict(betaEffectsLMList$`0`, type = "response",
                                                re.form = NA,
                                                newdata = plotData2[firePresAbs == 0])]
plotData2[firePresAbs == 1, predVals := predict(betaEffectsLMList$`1`, type = "response",
                                                re.form = NA,
                                                newdata = plotData2[firePresAbs == 1])]

plotTest4 <- ggplot(plotData2) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(x = firePresAbs, y = betaDiv, fill = scenario)) +
  geom_point(aes(x = firePresAbs, y = predVals, colour = scenario),
             position = position_dodge(width = 0.75), size = 2, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, colour = "grey", linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("red", "red")) +
  scale_fill_discrete(labels = scenLabels) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("0" = "no fire", "1" = "fire")) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  labs(y = "beta-div.", x = "")

plotTest4
```

```{r betaDiv_scenario2}
## scenario effects on beta-div across landscape - regardless of fire presence
## from multiplicative decomposition where both alpha
## and gamma diversity are inverse Simpson concentration (Whittaker 1972)
# alpha-div
plotData <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[year == endYear]
plotData[, sumB := sum(B, na.rm = TRUE),
         by = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex, ecoregionGroup)]
plotData <- plotData[, list(relB = sum(B, na.rm = TRUE)/sumB),
                     by = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex, speciesCode, ecoregionGroup)]
plotData <- plotData[, list(alphaDiv = 1/sum(relB^2)),
                     by = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex, ecoregionGroup)]

## gamma-div
plotData2 <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[year == endYear,
                                   list(BiomassBySpecies = sum(B, na.rm = TRUE)),
                                   by = .(scenario, rep, speciesCode, ecoregionGroup)]
plotData2[, sumB := sum(BiomassBySpecies, na.rm = TRUE),
          .(scenario, rep, ecoregionGroup)]
plotData2 <- plotData2[, list(relB = sum(BiomassBySpecies, na.rm = TRUE)/sumB),
                       by = .(scenario, rep, speciesCode, ecoregionGroup)]
plotData2 <- plotData2[, list(gammaDiv = 1/sum(relB^2)),
                       by = .(scenario, rep, ecoregionGroup)]

## beta-div
plotData2 <- plotData2[plotData, on = .(scenario, rep, ecoregionGroup)]
plotData2 <- plotData2[, list(betaDiv = gammaDiv * sum((1/.N) * (1/alphaDiv), na.rm = TRUE)),
                       by = .(scenario, rep, ecoregionGroup)]

plotData2[, ecoregionGroup := as.factor(ecoregionGroup)]
plotData2 <- unique(plotData2[!is.na(ecoregionGroup) & !is.na(betaDiv)])

## some ecoregionGroups only have one observation, leading to signular fit
betaEffectsLMList2 <- lmer(betaDiv ~ scenario + (1|ecoregionGroup), data = plotData2)
## no effect - pixels wihout fire dampen the response.
plotData2[, predVals := predict(betaEffectsLMList2, type = "response", re.form = NA)]

plotTest5 <- ggplot(plotData2) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(x = scenario, y = betaDiv, fill = scenario)) +
  geom_point(aes(x = scenario, y = predVals, colour = scenario),
             position = position_dodge(width = 0.75), size = 2, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, colour = "grey", linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_fill_discrete(labels = scenLabels) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = scenLabels) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("red", "red")) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  labs(y = "beta-div.", x = "")
```

```{r plot&savePlots2, echo = FALSE}
plotSave <- ggarrange(plotTest2 + theme(legend.position = "none"),
                      plotTest3 + theme(legend.position = "none"),
                      plotTest5 + theme(legend.position = "none"),
                      get_legend(plotTest2 + theme(legend.key.size = unit(1.5, "cm"))),
                      ncol = 2, nrow = 2,
                      labels = c("a", "b", "c", ""), font.label = list(size = 20))
plotSave
ggsave(plot = plotSave, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "results_ageAlphaBetaDivEffectsTest.tiff"),
       width = 12, height = 7)
rm(plotTest2, plotTest3, plotTest5)
gc()
```

```{r modelSave, include = FALSE}
## save models:
saveRDS(ageDiffLMList, file = file.path(simPaths$outputPath, "ageDiffModel.rds"))
saveRDS(ageEffectsLMList, file = file.path(simPaths$outputPath, "ageEffectsModel.rds"))
saveRDS(alphaEffectsLMList, file = file.path(simPaths$outputPath, "alphaEffectsModel.rds"))
saveRDS(betaEffectsLMList, file = file.path(simPaths$outputPath, "betaEffectsModel.rds"))
saveRDS(betaEffectsLMList2, file = file.path(simPaths$outputPath, "betaEffectsModel2.rds"))
```

## BIOMASS, MORTALITY, AVG. AGE AND NO COHORTS BY SPECIES
```{r plotsBySpecies, cache = FALSE}
## PLOTS -----------------------------------------------
## MODELLED PROPERTIES ---------------------------------
## BY SPECIES ------------
## total biomass
plotData <- summaryBurnCohortDataSpp[, list(BiomassBySpecies = sum(BiomassBySpecies)),
                                     by = .(scenario, year, rep, speciesCode, firePresAbs)]
plot1 <- ggplot(data = plotData,
                aes(x = year, y = log(BiomassBySpecies + 0.000001), colour = speciesCode)) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "line", size = 1) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = speciesColours, labels = speciesLabels) +
  labs(title = "Total landscape biomass", y = "log-biomass (ton/ha)",
       subtitle = "by species") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 1.5))) +
  facet_grid(scenario ~ firePresAbs,
             labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels, firePresAbs = c("0" = "no fire", "1" = "fire")))

plot2 <- ggplot(data = summaryBurnCohortDataSpp,
                aes(x = year, y = log(BiomassBySpecies + 0.000001), colour = speciesCode)) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "line", size = 1) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = speciesColours, labels = speciesLabels) +
  labs(title = "Total landscape biomass", y = "log-biomass (ton/ha)",
       subtitle = "by species") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 1.5))) +
  facet_grid(scenario ~ noFires, labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels))

## total mortality
plotData <- summaryBurnCohortDataSpp[, list(MortalityBySpecies = sum(MortalityBySpecies)),
                                     by = .(scenario, year, rep, speciesCode, firePresAbs)]
plot3 <- ggplot(data = plotData,
                aes(x = year, y = log(MortalityBySpecies + 0.000001), colour = speciesCode)) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "line", size = 1) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = speciesColours, labels = speciesLabels) +
  labs(title = "Total landscape mortality", y = "log-biomass (ton/ha)",
       subtitle = "by species") +
  facet_grid(scenario ~ firePresAbs,
             labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels, firePresAbs = c("0" = "no fire", "1" = "fire")))

plot4 <- ggplot(data = summaryBurnCohortDataSpp,
                aes(x = year, y = log(MortalityBySpecies + 0.000001), colour = speciesCode)) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "line", size = 1) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = speciesColours, labels = speciesLabels) +
  labs(title = "Total landscape mortality", y = "log-biomass (ton/ha)",
       subtitle = "by species") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 1.5))) +
  facet_grid(scenario ~ noFires, labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels))
amc::.gc()

## average age
plotData <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[, list(AgeBySppWeighted = as.numeric(sum(age * (B/100), na.rm = TRUE) /
                                                                         sum((B/100), na.rm = TRUE))),
                                  by = .(scenario, year, rep, firePresAbs, speciesCode)]
plot5 <- ggplot(data = plotData,
                aes(x = year, y = AgeBySppWeighted, colour = speciesCode)) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "line", size = 1) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = speciesColours, labels = speciesLabels) +
  labs(title = "Avg. age", y = "biomass-weighted age",
       subtitle = "by species") +
  facet_grid(scenario ~ firePresAbs,
             labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels, firePresAbs = c("0" = "no fire", "1" = "fire")))

plot6 <- ggplot(data = summaryBurnCohortDataSpp,
                aes(x = year, y = AgeBySppWeighted, colour = speciesCode)) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "line", size = 1) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = speciesColours, labels = speciesLabels) +
  labs(title = "Avg. age", y = "biomass-weighted age",
       subtitle = "by species") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 1.5))) +
  facet_grid(scenario ~ noFires, labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels))

## no. cohorts
plotData <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[B > 0, list(noCohorts = length(unique(age))),
                                  by = .(scenario, year, rep, pixelIndex, firePresAbs, noFires, speciesCode)]
plot7 <- ggplot(data = plotData,
                aes(x = year, y = noCohorts, colour = speciesCode)) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "line", size = 1) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = speciesColours, labels = speciesLabels) +
  labs(title = "Avg. no. cohorts", y = "no. cohorts",
       subtitle = "by species") +
  facet_grid(scenario ~ firePresAbs,
             labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels, firePresAbs = c("0" = "no fire", "1" = "fire")))

plot8 <- ggplot(data = plotData,
                aes(x = year, y = noCohorts, colour = speciesCode)) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "line", size = 1) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = speciesColours, labels = speciesLabels) +
  labs(title = "Avg. no. cohorts", y = "no. cohorts",
       subtitle = "by species") +
  facet_grid(scenario ~ noFires, labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels))

amc::.gc()
```

```{r plot&savePlots3, echo = FALSE}
## biomass
plotSave <- ggarrange(plot1,
                      plot2 +
                        theme(axis.title.y = element_blank(), axis.text.y = element_blank()) +
                        labs(title = "", subtitle = ""),
                      widths = c(0.4, 0.7),
                      legend = "bottom", common.legend = TRUE,
                      labels = "auto", font.label = list(size = 20))
plotSave
ggsave(plot = plotSave, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "results_landscapeB.tiff"),
       width = 14, height = 7)

## age
plotSave <- ggarrange(plot5,
                      plot6 +
                        theme(axis.title.y = element_blank(), axis.text.y = element_blank()) +
                        labs(title = "", subtitle = ""),
                      widths = c(0.4, 0.7),
                      legend = "bottom", common.legend = TRUE,
                      labels = "auto", font.label = list(size = 20))
plotSave
ggsave(plot = plotSave, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "results_landscapeAge.tiff"),
       width = 14, height = 7)

## no. cohorts:
plotSave <- ggarrange(plot7 + theme(plot.subtitle = element_blank()),
                      plot8 +
                        theme(plot.subtitle = element_blank(),
                              axis.title.y = element_blank(), axis.text.y = element_blank()) +
                        labs(title = "", subtitle = ""),
                      widths = c(0.4, 0.7),
                      legend = "bottom", common.legend = TRUE,
                      labels = "auto", font.label = list(size = 20))
plotSave
ggsave(plot = plotSave, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "results_noCohorts.tiff"),
       width = 14, height = 7)
rm(plot1, plot2, plot5, plot6, plot7, plot8)
gc()
```

## BIOMASS, MORTALITY, AVG. AGE AND NO COHORTS BY VEG TYPE (dom species)
```{r plotsByDomSpecies, cache = FALSE}
## BY FOREST TYPE (DOMINANT SPECIES) ------------
## no. pixels
plotData <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[, list(noPixelsVeg = length(unique(pixelIndex))),
                                  by = .(scenario, year, rep, firePresAbs, vegType)]
## add 0s to missing veg types in a year
plotData <- plotData %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = vegType, values_from = noPixelsVeg,
                     values_fill = list(noPixelsVeg = 0)) %>%
  as.data.table(.) %>%
  melt(., id.vars = c("scenario", "year", "rep", "firePresAbs"),
       variable.name = "vegType", value.name = "noPixelsVeg")

plot9 <- ggplot(data = plotData,
                aes(x = year, y = noPixelsVeg, fill = as.factor(vegType))) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "area", position = "stack") +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = vegTypeColours, labels = vegTypeLabels) +
  labs(title = "Abundance of cover type", y = "no. pixels",
       subtitle = "(dominant species cover type)") +
  facet_grid(scenario ~ firePresAbs,
             labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels, firePresAbs = c("0" = "no fire", "1" = "fire")))

plot9.2 <- ggplot(data = plotData,
                  aes(x = year, y = noPixelsVeg, fill = as.factor(vegType))) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "area", position = "fill") +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = vegTypeColours, labels = vegTypeLabels) +
  labs(title = "Cover type abundance", y = "prop. pixels",
       subtitle = "(dominant species cover type)") +
  facet_grid(scenario ~ firePresAbs,
             labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels, firePresAbs = c("0" = "no fire", "1" = "fire")))
amc::.gc()

plotData <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[, list(noPixelsVeg = length(unique(pixelIndex))),
                                  by = .(scenario, year, rep, noFires, vegType)]
## add 0s to missing veg types in a year
plotData <- plotData %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = vegType, values_from = noPixelsVeg,
                     values_fill = list(noPixelsVeg = 0)) %>%
  as.data.table(.) %>%
  melt(., id.vars = c("scenario", "year", "rep", "noFires"),
       variable.name = "vegType", value.name = "noPixelsVeg")

plot10 <- ggplot(data = plotData,
                 aes(x = year, y = noPixelsVeg, fill = as.factor(vegType))) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "area", position = "stack") +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = vegTypeColours, labels = vegTypeLabels) +
  labs(title = "Cover type abundance", y = "no. pixels",
       subtitle = "(dominant species cover type)") +
  facet_grid(scenario ~ noFires, labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels))

plot10.2 <- ggplot(data = plotData,
                   aes(x = year, y = noPixelsVeg, fill = as.factor(vegType))) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "area", position = "fill") +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = vegTypeColours, labels = vegTypeLabels) +
  labs(title = "Cover type abundance", y = "prop. pixels",
       subtitle = "(dominant species cover type)") +
  facet_grid(scenario ~ noFires, labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels))

## no. cohorts
plotData <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[B > 0, list(noCohorts = length(unique(age))),
                                  by = .(scenario, year, rep, pixelIndex, firePresAbs, noFires, vegType)]
plot11 <- ggplot(data = plotData,
                 aes(x = year, y = noCohorts, colour = as.factor(vegType))) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "line", size = 1) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = vegTypeColours, labels = vegTypeLabels) +
  labs(title = "Avg. no. cohorts in a stand", y = "no. cohorts",
       subtitle = "by dom. species cover type") +
  facet_grid(scenario ~ firePresAbs,
             labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels, firePresAbs = c("0" = "no fire", "1" = "fire")))

plot12 <- ggplot(data = plotData,
                 aes(x = year, y = noCohorts, colour = as.factor(vegType))) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "line", size = 1) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = vegTypeColours, labels = vegTypeLabels) +
  labs(title = "Avg. no. cohorts in a stand", y = "no. cohorts",
       subtitle = "by dom. species cover type") +
  facet_grid(scenario ~ noFires, labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels))

## total biomass
plotData <- summaryBurnCohortDataVegType[, list(BiomassByVegType = sum(BiomassByVegType)),
                                         by = .(scenario, year, rep, vegType, firePresAbs)]
plot13 <- ggplot(data = plotData,
                 aes(x = year, y = log(BiomassByVegType + 0.000001), colour = as.factor(vegType))) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "line", size = 1) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = vegTypeColours, labels = vegTypeLabels) +
  labs(title = "Total biomass", y = "log-biomass (ton/ha)",
       subtitle = "by dom. species cover type") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 1.5))) +
  facet_grid(scenario ~ firePresAbs,
             labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels, firePresAbs = c("0" = "no fire", "1" = "fire")))

plot14 <- ggplot(data = summaryBurnCohortDataVegType,
                 aes(x = year, y = log(BiomassByVegType + 0.000001), colour = as.factor(vegType))) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "line", size = 1) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = vegTypeColours, labels = vegTypeLabels) +
  labs(title = "Total biomass", y = "log-biomass (ton/ha)",
       subtitle = "by dom. species cover type") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 1.5))) +
  facet_grid(scenario ~ noFires, labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels))


plot14 <- ggplot(data = summaryBurnCohortDataVegType,
                 aes(x = year, y = log(BiomassByVegType + 0.000001), colour = as.factor(vegType))) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "line", size = 1) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = vegTypeColours, labels = vegTypeLabels) +
  labs(title = "Total biomass", y = "log-biomass (ton/ha)",
       subtitle = "by dom. species cover type") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 1.5))) +
  facet_grid(scenario ~ noFires, labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels))


## total mortality
plotData <- summaryBurnCohortDataVegType[, list(MortalityByVegType = sum(MortalityByVegType)),
                                         by = .(scenario, year, rep, vegType, firePresAbs)]
plot15 <- ggplot(data = plotData,
                 aes(x = year, y = log(MortalityByVegType + 0.000001), colour = as.factor(vegType))) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "line", size = 1) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = vegTypeColours, labels = vegTypeLabels) +
  labs(title = "Total mortality", y = "log-biomass (ton/ha)",
       subtitle = "by dom. species cover type") +
  facet_grid(scenario ~ firePresAbs,
             labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels, firePresAbs = c("0" = "no fire", "1" = "fire")))

plot16 <- ggplot(data = summaryBurnCohortDataVegType,
                 aes(x = year, y = log(MortalityByVegType + 0.000001), colour = as.factor(vegType))) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "line", size = 1) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = vegTypeColours, labels = vegTypeLabels) +
  labs(title = "Total mortality", y = "log-biomass (ton/ha)",
       subtitle = "by dom. species cover type") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 1.5))) +
  facet_grid(scenario ~ noFires, labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels))

## average age
plotData <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[, list(AgeBySppWeighted = as.numeric(sum(age * (B/100), na.rm = TRUE) /
                                                                         sum((B/100), na.rm = TRUE))),
                                  by = .(scenario, year, rep, firePresAbs, vegType)]

plot17 <- ggplot(data = plotData,
                 aes(x = year, y = AgeBySppWeighted, colour = as.factor(vegType))) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "line", size = 1) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = vegTypeColours, labels = vegTypeLabels) +
  labs(title = "Avg. age", y = "biomass-weighted age",
       subtitle = "by dominant species cover type") +
  facet_grid(scenario ~ firePresAbs,
             labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels, firePresAbs = c("0" = "no fire", "1" = "fire")))

plot18 <- ggplot(data = summaryBurnCohortDataVegType,
                 aes(x = year, y = AgeBySppWeighted, colour = as.factor(vegType))) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "line", size = 1) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = vegTypeColours, labels = vegTypeLabels) +
  labs(title = "Avg. age", y = "biomass-weighted age",
       subtitle = "by dominant species cover type") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 1.5))) +
  facet_grid(scenario ~ noFires, labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels))
amc::.gc()
```

```{r plot&savePlots4, echo = FALSE}
## biomass
plotSave <- ggarrange(plot13 + theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 17)),
                      plot14 +
                        theme(axis.title.y = element_blank(), axis.text.y = element_blank()) +
                        labs(title = "", subtitle = ""),
                      widths = c(0.4, 0.7),
                      legend = "bottom", common.legend = TRUE,
                      labels = "auto", font.label = list(size = 20))
plotSave
ggsave(plot = plotSave, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "results_landscapeBVegType.tiff"),
       width = 14, height = 7)

## age
plotSave <- ggarrange(plot17,
                      plot18 +
                        theme(axis.title.y = element_blank(), axis.text.y = element_blank()) +
                        labs(title = "", subtitle = ""),
                      widths = c(0.4, 0.7),
                      legend = "bottom", common.legend = TRUE,
                      labels = "auto", font.label = list(size = 20))
plotSave
ggsave(plot = plotSave, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "results_landscapeAgeVegType.tiff"),
       width = 14, height = 7)

## veg type abundance 
plotSave <- ggarrange(plot9.2,
                      plot10.2 +
                        theme(axis.title.y = element_blank(), axis.text.y = element_blank()) +
                        labs(title = ""),
                      widths = c(0.4, 0.7), labels = "auto", font.label = list(size = 20),
                      legend = "bottom", common.legend = TRUE)
plotSave
ggsave(plot = plotSave, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "results_landscapeVegTypes.tiff"),
       width = 14, height = 7)

## no. cohorts
plotSave <- ggarrange(plot11,
                      plot12 +
                        theme(axis.title.y = element_blank(), axis.text.y = element_blank()) +
                        labs(title = "", subtitle = ""),
                      widths = c(0.4, 0.7),
                      legend = "bottom", common.legend = TRUE,
                      labels = "auto", font.label = list(size = 20))
plotSave
ggsave(plot = plotSave, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "results_noCohortsVegType.tiff"),
       width = 14, height = 7)

rm(plot13, plot14, plot17, plot18, plot9.2, plot10.2, plot11, plot12)
gc()
```

## BIOMASS, MORTALITY, AVG. AGE AND NO COHORTS BY FUNCTIONAL VEG TYPE (Cameron's veg types)
For biomass, mortality, age and no. cohorts forest types are defined at the last year of the simulation and pixels are kept constant.
```{r plotsByFunctVegType, cache = FALSE}
## BY CAMERON'S VEG TYPE ------------
## no. pixels
plotData <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[, list(noPixelsVeg = length(unique(pixelIndex))),
                                  by = .(scenario, year, rep, firePresAbs, vegTypeCN)]
## add 0s to missing veg types in a year
plotData <- plotData %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = vegTypeCN, values_from = noPixelsVeg,
                     values_fill = list(noPixelsVeg = 0)) %>%
  as.data.table(.) %>%
  melt(., id.vars = c("scenario", "year", "rep", "firePresAbs"),
       variable.name = "vegTypeCN", value.name = "noPixelsVeg")

plot19 <- ggplot(data = plotData,
                 aes(x = year, y = noPixelsVeg, fill = vegTypeCN)) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "area", position = "stack") +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = vegTypeCNColours, labels = vegTypeCNLabels) +
  labs(title = "Cover type abundance", y = "no. pixels",
       subtitle = "(forest type)") +
  facet_grid(scenario ~ firePresAbs,
             labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels, firePresAbs = c("0" = "no fire", "1" = "fire")))

plot19.2 <- ggplot(data = plotData,
                   aes(x = year, y = noPixelsVeg, fill = vegTypeCN)) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "area", position = "fill") +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = vegTypeCNColours, labels = vegTypeCNLabels) +
  labs(title = "Cover type abundance", y = "prop. pixels",
       subtitle = "(forest type)") +
  facet_grid(scenario ~ firePresAbs,
             labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels, firePresAbs = c("0" = "no fire", "1" = "fire")))
amc::.gc()

plotData <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[, list(noPixelsVeg = length(unique(pixelIndex))),
                                  by = .(scenario, year, rep, noFires, vegTypeCN)]
## add 0s to missing veg types in a year
plotData <- plotData %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = vegTypeCN, values_from = noPixelsVeg,
                     values_fill = list(noPixelsVeg = 0)) %>%
  as.data.table(.) %>%
  melt(., id.vars = c("scenario", "year", "rep", "noFires"),
       variable.name = "vegTypeCN", value.name = "noPixelsVeg")

plot20 <- ggplot(data = plotData,
                 aes(x = year, y = noPixelsVeg, fill = vegTypeCN)) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "area", position = "stack") +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = vegTypeCNColours, labels = vegTypeCNLabels) +
  labs(title = "Cover type abundance", y = "no. pixels",
       subtitle = "(forest type)") +
  facet_grid(scenario ~ noFires, labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels))

plot20.2 <- ggplot(data = plotData,
                   aes(x = year, y = noPixelsVeg, fill = vegTypeCN)) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "area", position = "fill") +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = vegTypeCNColours, labels = vegTypeCNLabels) +
  labs(title = "Cover type abundance", y = "prop. pixels",
       subtitle = "(forest type)") +
  facet_grid(scenario ~ noFires, labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels))

## no. cohorts
pixelIDs <- unique(allPixelCohortDataMnt[year == endYear, .(vegTypeCN, scenario, rep, pixelIndex)])  
plotData <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[pixelIDs, on = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex)]
plotData[, vegTypeCN := i.vegTypeCN]
plotData[, i.vegTypeCN := NULL]
plotData <- plotData[B > 0, list(noCohorts = length(unique(age))),
                     by = .(scenario, year, rep, pixelIndex, firePresAbs, noFires, vegTypeCN)]
plot21 <- ggplot(plotData,
                 aes(x = year, y = noCohorts, colour = vegTypeCN)) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "line", size = 1) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = vegTypeCNColours, labels = vegTypeCNLabels) +
  labs(title = "Avg. no. cohorts", y = "no. cohorts",
       subtitle = "by forest type") +
  facet_grid(scenario ~ firePresAbs,
             labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels, firePresAbs = c("0" = "no fire", "1" = "fire")))

plot22 <- ggplot(data = plotData,
                 aes(x = year, y = noCohorts, colour = vegTypeCN)) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "line", size = 1) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = vegTypeCNColours, labels = vegTypeCNLabels) +
  labs(title = "Avg. no. cohorts", y = "no. cohorts",
       subtitle = "by forest type") +
  facet_grid(scenario ~ noFires, labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels))

## total biomass
pixelIDs <- unique(allPixelCohortDataMnt[year == endYear, .(vegTypeCN, scenario, rep, pixelIndex)])  

plotData <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[pixelIDs, on = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex)]
plotData[, vegTypeCN := i.vegTypeCN]
plotData[, i.vegTypeCN := NULL]
plotData <- plotData[, BiomassByVegType := sum(B),
                     by = .(scenario, year, rep, pixelIndex, firePresAbs, noFires, vegTypeCN)]
plotData <- plotData[, list(BiomassByVegType = sum(BiomassByVegType)),
                     by = .(scenario, year, rep, vegTypeCN, firePresAbs)]
plot23 <- ggplot(data = plotData[vegTypeCN != "No veg."],
                 aes(x = year, y = log(BiomassByVegType + 0.000001), colour = vegTypeCN)) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "line", size = 1) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = vegTypeCNColours, labels = vegTypeCNLabels) +
  labs(title = "Total biomass", y = "log-biomass (ton/ha)",
       subtitle = "by forest type") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 1.5))) +
  facet_grid(scenario ~ firePresAbs,
             labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels, firePresAbs = c("0" = "no fire", "1" = "fire")))

## total biomass BY pixel (not summed, but averaged across the landscape)
pixelIDs <- unique(allPixelCohortDataMnt[year == endYear, .(vegTypeCN, scenario, rep, pixelIndex)])  

plotData <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[pixelIDs, on = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex)]
plotData[, vegTypeCN := i.vegTypeCN]
plotData[, i.vegTypeCN := NULL]
plotData[, sumB := sum(B, na.rm = TRUE), by = .(scenario, rep, year, pixelIndex)]
plotData <- plotData[vegTypeCN != "No veg.", list(avgSumB = mean(sumB, na.rm = TRUE)),
                     by = .(scenario, rep, year, vegTypeCN, firePresAbs)]
plot23.2 <- ggplot(data = plotData,
                   aes(x = year, y = log(avgSumB + 0.000001), colour = vegTypeCN)) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "line", size = 1) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = vegTypeCNColours, labels = vegTypeCNLabels) +
  labs(title = "Total biomass", y = "log-biomass (ton/ha)",
       subtitle = "by forest type") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 1.5))) +
  facet_grid(scenario ~ firePresAbs,
             labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels, firePresAbs = c("0" = "no fire", "1" = "fire")))

pixelIDs <- unique(allPixelCohortDataMnt[year == endYear, .(vegTypeCN, scenario, rep, pixelIndex)])  

plotData <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[pixelIDs, on = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex)]
plotData[, vegTypeCN := i.vegTypeCN]
plotData[, i.vegTypeCN := NULL]
plotData <- plotData[, BiomassByVegType := sum(B),
                     by = .(scenario, year, rep, pixelIndex, firePresAbs, noFires, vegTypeCN)]
plotData <- plotData[, list(BiomassByVegType = sum(BiomassByVegType)),
                     by = .(scenario, year, rep, vegTypeCN, noFires)]

plot24 <- ggplot(data = plotData[vegTypeCN != "No veg."],
                 aes(x = year, y = log(BiomassByVegType + 0.000001), colour = vegTypeCN)) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "line", size = 1) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = vegTypeCNColours, labels = vegTypeCNLabels) +
  labs(title = "Total biomass", y = "log-biomass (ton/ha)",
       subtitle = "by forest type") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 1.5))) +
  facet_grid(scenario ~ noFires, labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels))

pixelIDs <- unique(allPixelCohortDataMnt[year == endYear, .(vegTypeCN, scenario, rep, pixelIndex)])  
plotData <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[pixelIDs, on = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex)]
plotData[, vegTypeCN := i.vegTypeCN]
plotData[, i.vegTypeCN := NULL]
plotData[, sumB := sum(B, na.rm = TRUE), by = .(scenario, rep, year, pixelIndex)]
plotData <- plotData[vegTypeCN != "No veg.", list(avgSumB = mean(sumB)),
                     by = .(scenario, rep, year, vegTypeCN, noFires)]
plot24.2 <- ggplot(data = plotData,
                   aes(x = year, y = log(avgSumB + 0.000001), colour = vegTypeCN)) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "line", size = 1) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = vegTypeCNColours, labels = vegTypeCNLabels) +
  labs(title = "Total biomass", y = "log-biomass (ton/ha)",
       subtitle = "by forest type") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 1.5))) +
  facet_grid(scenario ~ noFires, labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels))

## total mortality
pixelIDs <- unique(allPixelCohortDataMnt[year == endYear, .(vegTypeCN, scenario, rep, pixelIndex)])  

plotData <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[pixelIDs, on = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex)]
plotData[, vegTypeCN := i.vegTypeCN]
plotData[, i.vegTypeCN := NULL]
plotData <- plotData[, MortalityByVegType := sum(mortality),
                     by = .(scenario, year, rep, pixelIndex, firePresAbs, noFires, vegTypeCN)]
plotData <- plotData[, list(MortalityByVegType = sum(MortalityByVegType)),
                     by = .(scenario, year, rep, vegTypeCN, firePresAbs)]

plot25 <- ggplot(data = plotData[vegTypeCN != "No veg."],
                 aes(x = year, y = log(MortalityByVegType + 0.000001), colour = vegTypeCN)) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "line", size = 1) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = vegTypeCNColours, labels = vegTypeCNLabels) +
  labs(title = "Total mortality", y = "log-biomass (ton/ha)",
       subtitle = "by forest type") +
  facet_grid(scenario ~ firePresAbs,
             labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels, firePresAbs = c("0" = "no fire", "1" = "fire")))

pixelIDs <- unique(allPixelCohortDataMnt[year == endYear, .(vegTypeCN, scenario, rep, pixelIndex)])

plotData <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[pixelIDs, on = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex)]
plotData[, vegTypeCN := i.vegTypeCN]
plotData[, i.vegTypeCN := NULL]
plotData <- plotData[, MortalityByVegType := sum(mortality),
                     by = .(scenario, year, rep, pixelIndex, firePresAbs, noFires, vegTypeCN)]
plotData <- plotData[, list(MortalityByVegType = sum(MortalityByVegType)),
                     by = .(scenario, year, rep, vegTypeCN, noFires)]
plot26 <- ggplot(data = plotData[vegTypeCN != "No veg."],
                 aes(x = year, y = log(MortalityByVegType + 0.000001), colour = vegTypeCN)) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "line", size = 1) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = vegTypeCNColours, labels = vegTypeCNLabels) +
  labs(title = "Total mortality", y = "log-biomass (ton/ha)",
       subtitle = "by forest type") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 1.5))) +
  facet_grid(scenario ~ noFires, labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels))

## average age
pixelIDs <- unique(allPixelCohortDataMnt[year == endYear, .(vegTypeCN, scenario, rep, pixelIndex)])  

plotData <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[pixelIDs, on = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex)]
plotData[, vegTypeCN := i.vegTypeCN]
plotData[, i.vegTypeCN := NULL]
plotData <- plotData[, list(AgeBySppWeighted = as.numeric(sum(age * (B/100), na.rm = TRUE) /
                                                            sum((B/100), na.rm = TRUE))),
                     by = .(scenario, year, rep, firePresAbs, vegTypeCN)]
plot27 <- ggplot(data = plotData,
                 aes(x = year, y = AgeBySppWeighted, colour = vegTypeCN)) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "line", size = 1) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = vegTypeCNColours, labels = vegTypeCNLabels) +
  labs(title = "Avg. age", y = "biomass-weighted age",
       subtitle = "by forest type") +
  facet_grid(scenario ~ firePresAbs,
             labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels, firePresAbs = c("0" = "no fire", "1" = "fire")))

pixelIDs <- unique(allPixelCohortDataMnt[year == endYear, .(vegTypeCN, scenario, rep, pixelIndex)])  

plotData <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[pixelIDs, on = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex)]
plotData[, vegTypeCN := i.vegTypeCN]
plotData[, i.vegTypeCN := NULL]
plotData <- plotData[, list(AgeBySppWeighted = as.numeric(sum(age * (B/100), na.rm = TRUE) /
                                                            sum((B/100), na.rm = TRUE))),
                     by = .(scenario, year, rep, noFires, vegTypeCN)]
plot28 <- ggplot(data = plotData,
                 aes(x = year, y = AgeBySppWeighted, colour = vegTypeCN)) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "line", size = 1) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = vegTypeCNColours, labels = vegTypeCNLabels) +
  labs(title = "Avg. age", y = "biomass-weighted age",
       subtitle = "by forest type") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 1.5))) +
  facet_grid(scenario ~ noFires, labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels))
```

```{r plot&savePlots5, echo = FALSE}
## biomass
plotSave <- ggarrange(plot23,
                      plot24 +
                        theme(axis.title.y = element_blank(), axis.text.y = element_blank()) +
                        labs(title = "", subtitle = ""),
                      widths = c(0.4, 0.7),
                      legend = "bottom", common.legend = TRUE,
                      labels = "auto", font.label = list(size = 20))
plotSave
ggsave(plot = plotSave, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "fixedPixels", "results_landscapeBVegTypeCN.tiff"),
       width = 14, height = 7)

## biomass
plotSave <- ggarrange(plot23.2,
                      plot24.2 +
                        theme(axis.title.y = element_blank(), axis.text.y = element_blank()) +
                        labs(title = "", subtitle = ""),
                      widths = c(0.4, 0.7),
                      legend = "bottom", common.legend = TRUE,
                      labels = "auto", font.label = list(size = 20))
plotSave
ggsave(plot = plotSave, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "fixedPixels", "results_pixelBVegTypeCN.tiff"),
       width = 14, height = 7)
## age
plotSave <- ggarrange(plot27,
                      plot28 +
                        theme(axis.title.y = element_blank(), axis.text.y = element_blank()) +
                        labs(title = "", subtitle = ""),
                      widths = c(0.4, 0.7),
                      legend = "bottom", common.legend = TRUE,
                      labels = "auto", font.label = list(size = 20))
plotSave
ggsave(plot = plotSave, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "fixedPixels", "results_landscapeAgeVegTypeCN.tiff"),
       width = 14, height = 7)

## veg type abundance 
plotSave <- ggarrange(plot19.2,
                      plot20.2 +
                        theme(axis.title.y = element_blank(), axis.text.y = element_blank()) +
                        labs(title = "", subtitle = ""),
                      widths = c(0.4, 0.7),
                      legend = "bottom", common.legend = TRUE,
                      labels = "auto", font.label = list(size = 20))
plotSave
ggsave(plot = plotSave, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "results_landscapeVegTypesCN.tiff"),
       width = 14, height = 7)

## no. cohorts
plotSave <- ggarrange(plot21,
                      plot22 +
                        theme(axis.title.y = element_blank(), axis.text.y = element_blank()) +
                        labs(title = "", subtitle = ""),
                      widths = c(0.4, 0.7),
                      legend = "bottom", common.legend = TRUE,
                      labels = "auto", font.label = list(size = 20))
plotSave
ggsave(plot = plotSave, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "fixedPixels", "results_noCohortsVegTypeCN.tiff"),
       width = 14, height = 7)

rm(plot23, plot24, plot27, plot28, plot19.2, plot20.2, plot21, plot22)
gc()
```

## SPECIES RELATIVE ABUNDANCE AND AVG. AGE AND NO COHORTS BY SPECIES WITHIN VEG TYPE
Averaged across pixels, burnt and unburnt. Forest types are defined at the last year of the simulation and pixels are kept constant.
```{r relB_plotsBySpecies, cache = FALSE}
## PLOTS -----------------------------------------------
## MODELLED PROPERTIES ---------------------------------
## BY SPECIES ------------
## sum biomass by spp within pixel, then average
pixelIDs <- unique(allPixelCohortDataMnt[year == endYear, .(vegTypeCN, scenario, rep, pixelIndex)])  
plotData <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[pixelIDs, on = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex)]
plotData[, vegTypeCN := i.vegTypeCN]
plotData[, i.vegTypeCN := NULL]

plotData <- plotData[, list(BiomassBySpecies = as.numeric(sum(B/100, na.rm = TRUE)),
                            AgeBySppWeighted = as.numeric(sum(age * (B/100), na.rm = TRUE) /
                                                            sum((B/100), na.rm = TRUE))),
                     by = .(scenario, year, rep, pixelIndex, vegTypeCN, speciesCode)]
plotData <- plotData[, sumB := sum(BiomassBySpecies, na.rm = TRUE),
                     by = .(scenario, year, rep, pixelIndex)]
plotData <- plotData[, relBBySpecies := BiomassBySpecies/sumB]
plotData2 <- plotData[, list(relBBySpecies = mean(relBBySpecies, na.rm = TRUE),
                             AgeBySppWeighted = mean(AgeBySppWeighted, na.rm = TRUE)),
                      by = .(scenario, year, rep, vegTypeCN, speciesCode)]
plotData2 <- rbind(plotData2,
                   plotData[, list(relBBySpecies = mean(relBBySpecies, na.rm = TRUE),
                                   AgeBySppWeighted = mean(AgeBySppWeighted, na.rm = TRUE),
                                   vegTypeCN = "landscape"),
                            by = .(scenario, year, rep, speciesCode)])


plot1.2 <- ggplot(data = plotData2,
                  aes(x = year, y = relBBySpecies, linetype = scenario, colour = speciesCode)) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "line", size = 1) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = scenLinetype,
                        labels = scenLabels) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = speciesColours, labels = speciesLabels) +
  labs(title = "Relative species abundance", y = "Average relative abundance\n(per pixel)") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 1.5))) +
  facet_wrap( ~ vegTypeCN, nrow = 2,
              labeller = labeller(vegTypeCN = vegTypeCNLabels))

## average age
plot5.2 <- ggplot(data = plotData2,
                  aes(x = year, y = AgeBySppWeighted, linetype = scenario, colour = speciesCode)) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "line", size = 1) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = speciesColours, labels = speciesLabels) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = scenLinetype,
                        labels = scenLabels) +
  labs(title = "Average species age", y = "biomass-weighted age") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 1.5))) +
  facet_wrap( ~ vegTypeCN, nrow = 2,
              labeller = labeller(vegTypeCN = vegTypeCNLabels))
amc::.gc()
```

```{r plot&savePlots6, echo = FALSE}
## biomass
plotSave <- ggarrange(plot1.2,
                      plot5.2,
                      legend = "bottom", common.legend = TRUE,
                      labels = "auto", font.label = list(size = 20))
plotSave
ggsave(plot = plotSave, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "fixedPixels", "results_meanRelB_Age_sppVegTypeCN.tiff"),
       width = 18, height = 8)

```

## COMPARING SIMULATED AND OBSERVED DATA
### Age means CIs - by species
