```{r simVsObsAges, cache = FALSE}
## SIMULATED VS. OBSERVED DATA ------------
## age distribution at end of simulation vs cameron's

## pixel-level differences from observed mean
plotData <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[year == endYear & B > 0,  ## absences can't lower the average ages
                                  list(AgeBySppWeighted = as.numeric(sum(age * (B/100), na.rm = TRUE) /
                                                                       sum((B/100), na.rm = TRUE))),
                                  by = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex, firePresAbs, speciesCode)]

plotData2 <- copy(ageDataCN[, .(Species, Reconstructed.age, firePresAbs)])
plotData2[grepl("POBA|POTR", Species), speciesCode := "Popu_sp"]  ## collapse populus
plotData2[grepl("ABLA", Species), speciesCode := "Abie_sp"]
plotData2[grepl("PIEN", Species), speciesCode := "Pice_eng"]
plotData2[grepl("PICO", Species), speciesCode := "Pinu_sp"]
plotData2[grepl("PSME", Species), speciesCode := "Pseu_men"]
plotData2 <- plotData2[!is.na(speciesCode)]

## make sure the data used here is the same in the MAD calculations
plotData <- plotData2[, list(avgAgeBySppObs = mean(Reconstructed.age, na.rm = TRUE)), 
                      by = .(speciesCode, firePresAbs)][plotData, on = .(speciesCode, firePresAbs)]
plotData[, firePresAbs := as.factor(firePresAbs)]
plotData[, ageDiffSimObs := AgeBySppWeighted - avgAgeBySppObs]
plotData <- plotData[!is.na(ageDiffSimObs)]

plot29 <- ggplot() +
  geom_violin(data = plotData,
              mapping = aes(x = speciesCode, y = AgeBySppWeighted, fill = scenario, colour = scenario),
              alpha = 0.3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
  stat_summary(data = plotData,
               mapping = aes(x = speciesCode, y = AgeBySppWeighted, colour = scenario),
               fun.data = "mean_cl_boot", 
               position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
  geom_violin(data = plotData2,
              mapping = aes(x = speciesCode, y = Reconstructed.age, colour = "observed", fill = "observed"),
              alpha = 0.3) +
  stat_summary(data = plotData2,
               aes(x = speciesCode, y = Reconstructed.age, colour = "observed"),
               fun.data = "mean_cl_boot") +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = speciesLabels) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("noPM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[1], "PM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[2],
                                 "observed" = "grey50"),
                      labels = c(scenLabels, "observed" = "observed")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("noPM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[1], "PM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[2],
                               "observed" = "grey50"),
                    labels = c(scenLabels, "observed" = "observed")) +
  labs(title = "Avg. age", y = "age", x = "",
       subtitle = "by species") +
  facet_grid( ~ firePresAbs,
              labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels, firePresAbs = c("0" = "no fire", "1" = "fire"))) 

plot30 <- ggplot() +
  geom_violin(data = plotData,
              mapping = aes(x = as.factor(firePresAbs), y = AgeBySppWeighted, fill = scenario, 
                            colour = scenario),
              alpha = 0.3,
              position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
  stat_summary(data = plotData,
               mapping = aes(x = as.factor(firePresAbs), y = AgeBySppWeighted, colour = scenario),
               fun.data = "mean_cl_boot", 
               position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
  geom_violin(data = plotData2,
              mapping = aes(x = as.factor(firePresAbs), y = Reconstructed.age, fill = "observed", 
                            colour = "observed"),
              alpha = 0.3,
              position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
  stat_summary(data = plotData2,
               aes(x = as.factor(firePresAbs), y = Reconstructed.age, colour = "observed"),
               fun.data = "mean_cl_boot") +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("noPM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[1], "PM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[2],
                                 "observed" = "grey50"),
                      labels = c(scenLabels, "observed" = "observed")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("noPM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[1], "PM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[2], 
                               "observed" = "grey50"),
                    labels = c(scenLabels, "observed" = "observed")) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom") +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("0" = "no fire", "1" = "fire")) +
  labs(title = "Avg. age", y = "age", x = "",
       subtitle = "across species")


## only fire pixels, no means
plotData3 <- data.table(plotData2[firePresAbs == 1], scenario = "observed")
setnames(plotData3, "Reconstructed.age", "AgeBySppWeighted")
plotData3 <- rbind(plotData3, plotData[firePresAbs == 1], fill = TRUE, use.names = TRUE)
plot29.1 <- ggplot() +
  geom_violin(data = plotData3,
              mapping =  aes(x = speciesCode, y = AgeBySppWeighted,
                             fill = scenario, colour = scenario),
              alpha = 0.3,
              position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = speciesLabels) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("noPM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[1], "PM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[2],
                                 "observed" = "grey50"),
                      labels = c(scenLabels, "observed" = "observed"), guide = "none") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("noPM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[1], "PM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[2],
                               "observed" = "grey50"),
                    labels = c(scenLabels, "observed" = "observed")) +
  labs(title = "Avg. age", y = "age", x = "",
       subtitle = "by species")

plot30.1 <- ggplot() +
  geom_violin(data = plotData3,
              mapping = aes(x = scenario, y = AgeBySppWeighted, fill = scenario, 
                            colour = scenario),
              alpha = 0.3,
              position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom") +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = scenLabels) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("noPM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[1], "PM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[2],
                                 "observed" = "grey50"),
                      labels = c(scenLabels, "observed" = "observed"), guide = "none") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("noPM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[1], "PM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[2],
                               "observed" = "grey50"),
                    labels = c(scenLabels, "observed" = "observed")) +
  labs(title = "Avg. age", y = "age", x = "",
       subtitle = "across species")

```

```{r plot&savePlots7, echo = FALSE}
plotSave <- plot_grid(plot_grid(plot29 + theme(legend.position = "none"),
                                plot30 + theme(legend.position = "none"),
                                nrow = 1, rel_widths = c(1, 0.7),
                                labels = "auto", label_size = 20, axis = "b", align = "h"),
                      get_legend(plot29 + theme(legend.direction = "vertical")), 
                      rel_widths = c(1, 0.15))
plotSave
ggsave(plot = plotSave, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "results_ageSimVsObs.tiff"),
       width = 14, height = 7)

plotSave <- plot_grid(plot_grid(plot29.1 + theme(legend.position = "none"),
                                plot30.1 + theme(legend.position = "none"),
                                nrow = 1, rel_widths = c(1, 0.7),
                                labels = "auto", label_size = 20, axis = "b", align = "h"),
                      get_legend(plot29.1 + theme(legend.direction = "vertical")), 
                      rel_widths = c(1, 0.15))
plotSave
ggsave(plot = plotSave, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "results_ageSimVsObs2.tiff"),
       width = 14, height = 7)
```

### Age means CIs - by forest type
Forest types are defined at the LAST year of the simulation and pixels are kept constant.
Choosing the last year is more similar to what happens in the field.

```{r simVsObsAges_vegType, cache = FALSE}
## SIMULATED VS. OBSERVED DATA ------------
## age distribution at end of simulation vs cameron's
pixelIDs <- unique(allPixelCohortDataMnt[year == endYear, .(scenario, rep, vegTypeCN, pixelIndex)])

plotData <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[pixelIDs, on = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex)]
plotData[, vegTypeCN := i.vegTypeCN]
plotData[, i.vegTypeCN := NULL]
plotData <- plotData[year == endYear & B > 0,  ## absences can't lower the average ages
                     list(AgeBySppWeighted = as.numeric(sum(age * (B/100), na.rm = TRUE) /
                                                          sum((B/100), na.rm = TRUE))),
                     by = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex, firePresAbs, vegTypeCN)]

plotData2 <- copy(ageDataCN[, .(Cover.dendro, Reconstructed.age, firePresAbs)])
setnames(plotData2, "Cover.dendro", "vegTypeCN")

## make sure the data used here is the same as in the MAD calculations
plotData <- plotData2[, list(avgAgeBySppObs = mean(Reconstructed.age, na.rm = TRUE)), 
                      by = .(vegTypeCN, firePresAbs)][plotData, on = .(vegTypeCN, firePresAbs)]
plotData[, firePresAbs := as.factor(firePresAbs)]
plotData[, ageDiffSimObs := AgeBySppWeighted - avgAgeBySppObs]
plotData <- plotData[!is.na(ageDiffSimObs)]

plot29.2 <- ggplot() +
  geom_violin(data = plotData,
              mapping = aes(x = vegTypeCN, y = AgeBySppWeighted, fill = scenario, 
                            colour = scenario),
              alpha = 0.3,
              position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
  stat_summary(data = plotData,
               mapping = aes(x = vegTypeCN, y = AgeBySppWeighted, colour = scenario),
               fun.data = "mean_cl_boot",
               position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
  geom_violin(data = plotData2,
              mapping = aes(x = vegTypeCN, y = Reconstructed.age, fill = "observed", 
                            colour = "observed"),
              alpha = 0.3,
              position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
  stat_summary(data = plotData2,
               aes(x = vegTypeCN, y = Reconstructed.age, colour = "observed"),
               fun.data = "mean_cl_boot",
               position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = vegTypeCNLabels) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("noPM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[1], "PM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[2],
                                 "observed" = "grey50"),
                      labels = c(scenLabels, "observed" = "observed")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("noPM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[1], "PM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[2],
                               "observed" = "grey50"),
                    labels = c(scenLabels, "observed" = "observed")) +
  labs(title = "Avg. age", y = "age", x = "",
       subtitle = "by forest type") +
  facet_grid( ~ firePresAbs,
              labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels, firePresAbs = c("0" = "no fire", "1" = "fire"))) 

plot30.2 <- ggplot() +
  geom_violin(data = plotData,
              mapping = aes(x = as.factor(firePresAbs), y = AgeBySppWeighted, fill = scenario, 
                            colour = scenario),
              alpha = 0.3,
              position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
  stat_summary(data = plotData,
               mapping = aes(x = as.factor(firePresAbs), y = AgeBySppWeighted, colour = scenario),
               fun.data = "mean_cl_boot",
               position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
  geom_violin(data = plotData2,
              aes(x = as.factor(firePresAbs), y = Reconstructed.age, fill = "observed", 
                  colour = "observed"),
              alpha = 0.3,
              position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
  stat_summary(data = plotData2,
               aes(x = as.factor(firePresAbs), y = Reconstructed.age, colour = "observed"),
               fun.data = "mean_cl_boot") +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("noPM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[1], "PM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[2],
                                 "observed" = "grey50"),
                      labels = c(scenLabels, "observed" = "observed")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("noPM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[1], "PM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[2],
                               "observed" = "grey50"),
                    labels = c(scenLabels, "observed" = "observed")) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom") +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("0" = "no fire", "1" = "fire")) +
  labs(title = "Avg. age", y = "age", x = "",
       subtitle = "across forest type")


## only fire pixels, no means
plotData3 <- data.table(plotData2[firePresAbs == 1], scenario = "observed")
setnames(plotData3, "Reconstructed.age", "AgeBySppWeighted")
plotData3 <- rbind(plotData3, plotData[firePresAbs == 1], fill = TRUE, use.names = TRUE)
plot29.3 <- ggplot() +
  geom_violin(data = plotData3,
              mapping = aes(x = vegTypeCN, y = AgeBySppWeighted, fill = scenario, 
                            colour = scenario),
              alpha = 0.3,
              position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = vegTypeCNLabels) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("noPM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[1], "PM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[2],
                                 "observed" = "grey50"),
                      labels = c(scenLabels, "observed" = "observed"), guide = "none") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("noPM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[1], "PM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[2],
                               "observed" = "grey50"),
                    labels = c(scenLabels, "observed" = "observed")) +
  labs(title = "Avg. age", y = "age", x = "",
       subtitle = "by forest type")

plot30.3 <- ggplot() +
  geom_violin(data = plotData3,
              mapping = aes(x = scenario, y = AgeBySppWeighted, fill = scenario, 
                            colour = scenario),
              alpha = 0.3,
              position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom") +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = scenLabels) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("noPM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[1], "PM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[2],
                                 "observed" = "grey50"),
                      labels = c(scenLabels, "observed" = "observed"), guide = "none") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("noPM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[1], "PM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[2],
                               "observed" = "grey50"),
                    labels = c(scenLabels, "observed" = "observed")) +
  labs(title = "Avg. age", y = "age", x = "",
       subtitle = "across forest type")
```

```{r plot&savePlots8, echo = FALSE}
plotSave <- plot_grid(plot_grid(plot29.2 + theme(legend.position = "none"),
                                plot30.2 + theme(legend.position = "none"),
                                nrow = 1, rel_widths = c(1, 0.7),
                                labels = "auto", label_size = 20, axis = "b", align = "h"),
                      get_legend(plot29.2 + theme(legend.direction = "vertical")), 
                      rel_widths = c(1, 0.15))
plotSave
ggsave(plot = plotSave, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "fixedPixels", "results_ageSimVsObsVegTypeCN.tiff"),
       width = 14, height = 7)

plotSave <- plot_grid(plot_grid(plot29.3 + theme(legend.position = "none"),
                                plot30.3 + theme(legend.position = "none"),
                                nrow = 1, rel_widths = c(1, 0.7),
                                labels = "auto", label_size = 20, axis = "b", align = "h"),
                      get_legend(plot29.3 + theme(legend.direction = "vertical")), 
                      rel_widths = c(1, 0.15))
plotSave
ggsave(plot = plotSave, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "fixedPixels", "results_ageSimVsObsVegTypeCN2.tiff"),
       width = 14, height = 7)
```

### No. cohorts means CIs by forest type
Forest types are defined at the LAST year of the simulation and pixels are kept constant.
Choosing the last year is more similar to what happens in the field.
```{r simVsObsCohorts, cache = FALSE}
## no. cohorts at end of simulation vs cameron's - subset to common veg types
pixelIDs <- unique(allPixelCohortDataMnt[year == endYear, .(scenario, rep, vegTypeCN, pixelIndex)])

plotData <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[pixelIDs, on = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex)]
plotData[, vegTypeCN := i.vegTypeCN]
plotData[, i.vegTypeCN := NULL]
plotData <- plotData[year == endYear & B > 0 & vegTypeCN %in% unique(ageDataCN$Cover.dendro),
                     list(noCohorts = length(unique(age))),
                     by = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex, firePresAbs, vegTypeCN)]
plot31 <- ggplot() +
  geom_violin(data = plotData,
              aes(x = vegTypeCN, y = noCohorts, fill = scenario, 
                  colour = scenario),
              alpha = 0.3,
              position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
  stat_summary(data = plotData,
               aes(x = vegTypeCN, y = noCohorts, colour = scenario), 
               fun.data = "mean_cl_boot", geom = "pointrange", 
               position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
  geom_violin(data = ageDataCN,
              aes(x = Cover.dendro, y = noCohorts, fill = "observed", 
                  colour = "observed"),
              alpha = 0.3,
              position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
  stat_summary(data = ageDataCN,
               aes(x = Cover.dendro, y = noCohorts, colour = "observed"),
               fun.data = "mean_cl_boot", geom = "pointrange",
               position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = vegTypeCNLabels) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("noPM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[1], "PM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[2],
                                 "observed" = "grey50"),
                      labels = c(scenLabels, "observed" = "observed")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("noPM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[1], "PM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[2], 
                               "observed" = "grey50"),
                    labels = c(scenLabels, "observed" = "observed")) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  labs(title = "Avg. no. cohorts", y = "no. cohorts", x = "",
       subtitle = "by forest type") +
  facet_grid(~ firePresAbs,
             labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels, firePresAbs = c("0" = "no fire", "1" = "fire")))
```

```{r plot&savePlots9, echo = FALSE}
plot31
ggsave(plot = plot31, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "fixedPixels", "results_noCohortsSimVsObsVegTypeCN.tiff"),
       width = 14, height = 7)
```

### No. cohorts means CIs by species
```{r simVsObsCohorts_species, cache = FALSE}
## no. cohorts at end of simulation vs cameron's - subset to common veg types
plotData <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[year == endYear & B > 0 & vegTypeCN %in% unique(ageDataCN$Cover.dendro),
                                  list(noCohorts = length(unique(age))),
                                  by = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex, firePresAbs, speciesCode)]
plotData2 <- copy(ageDataCN[, .(Species, noCohorts, firePresAbs)])
plotData2[grepl("POBA|POTR", Species), speciesCode := "Popu_sp"]  ## collapse populus
plotData2[grepl("ABLA", Species), speciesCode := "Abie_sp"]
plotData2[grepl("PIEN", Species), speciesCode := "Pice_eng"]
plotData2[grepl("PICO", Species), speciesCode := "Pinu_sp"]
plotData2[grepl("PSME", Species), speciesCode := "Pseu_men"]
plotData2 <- plotData2[!is.na(speciesCode)]

plot31.4 <- ggplot() +
  geom_violin(data = plotData,
              aes(x = speciesCode, y = noCohorts, fill = scenario, 
                  colour = scenario),
              alpha = 0.3,
              position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
  stat_summary(data = plotData,
               aes(x = speciesCode, y = noCohorts, colour = scenario), 
               fun.data = "mean_cl_boot", geom = "pointrange", 
               position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
  geom_violin(data = plotData2,
              aes(x = speciesCode, y = noCohorts, fill = "observed", 
                  colour = "observed"),
              alpha = 0.3,
              position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
  stat_summary(data = plotData2,
               aes(x = speciesCode, y = noCohorts, colour = "observed"),
               fun.data = "mean_cl_boot", geom = "pointrange",
               position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = speciesLabels) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("noPM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[1], "PM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[2],
                                 "observed" = "grey50"),
                      labels = c(scenLabels, "observed" = "observed")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("noPM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[1], "PM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[2], 
                               "observed" = "grey50"),
                    labels = c(scenLabels, "observed" = "observed")) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  labs(title = "Avg. no. cohorts", y = "no. cohorts", x = "",
       subtitle = "by species") +
  facet_grid(~ firePresAbs,
             labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels, firePresAbs = c("0" = "no fire", "1" = "fire")))
```

```{r plot&savePlots10, echo = FALSE}
plot31.4
ggsave(plot = plot31.4, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "results_noCohortsSimVsObsSpecies.tiff"),
       width = 14, height = 7)
```

### Mean absolute deviation of simulated no. cohorts with respect to average observed no. cohorts for a given stand type
Forest types are defined at the LAST year of the simulation and pixels are kept constant.
Choosing the last year is more similar to what happens in the field.
```{r simVsObsCohortsDif, cache = FALSE}
## Cohorts mean absolute deviation 
## calculate the mean absolute deviation of each stand to the observed average (per veg type) across reps
pixelIDs <- unique(allPixelCohortDataMnt[year == endYear, .(scenario, rep, vegTypeCN, pixelIndex)])

plotData <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[pixelIDs, on = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex)]
plotData[, vegTypeCN := i.vegTypeCN]
plotData[, i.vegTypeCN := NULL]
plotData <- plotData[year == endYear & B > 0 & vegTypeCN %in% unique(ageDataCN$Cover.dendro),
                     list(noCohorts = length(unique(age))),
                     by = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex, firePresAbs, vegTypeCN)]
plotData2 <- ageDataCN[, list(avgNoCohortsObs = mean(noCohorts, na.rm = TRUE)),
                       by = .(Cover.dendro, firePresAbs)]
plotData <- plotData2[plotData, on = c("Cover.dendro==vegTypeCN", "firePresAbs")]
setnames(plotData, "Cover.dendro", "vegTypeCN")

plotData <- plotData[!is.na(avgNoCohortsObs) & !is.na(noCohorts)]
plotData2 <- plotData[, list(meanAbsDevSimObs = 1/.N * sum(abs(noCohorts - avgNoCohortsObs))),
                      by = .(scenario, rep, vegTypeCN, firePresAbs)]

## differences
plot31.2 <- ggplot(plotData,
                   aes(x = vegTypeCN,
                       y = noCohorts - avgNoCohortsObs,
                       fill = scenario)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey") +
  geom_violin() +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = vegTypeCNLabels) +
  scale_fill_discrete(labels = scenLabels) +
  labs(title = "Avg differences from observed no. cohorts",
       y = expression("sim." - bar("obs.")), x = "") +
  facet_grid(~ firePresAbs,
             labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels, firePresAbs = c("0" = "no fire", "1" = "fire")))

## mean absolute deviation across reps
plot31.3 <- ggplot(plotData2,
                   aes(x = vegTypeCN, y = meanAbsDevSimObs,
                       colour = scenario)) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = "mean_sdl", position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom") +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted"),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, max(plotData2$meanAbsDevSimObs))) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = vegTypeCNLabels) +
  scale_colour_discrete(labels = scenLabels) +
  labs(title = "Mean abs. deviation from observed no. cohorts",
       y = expression(bar(bgroup("|", "sim." - bar("obs."), "|"))), x = "") +
  coord_flip() +
  facet_grid(~ firePresAbs,
             labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels, firePresAbs = c("0" = "no fire", "1" = "fire")))
```

```{r plot&savePlots11, echo = FALSE}
plot31.2
ggsave(plot = plot31.2 + theme(legend.position = "right"),
       filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "fixedPixels", "results_meanCohortDiffVegTypeCN.tiff"),
       width = 14, height = 7)
plot31.3
ggsave(plot = plot31.3 + theme(legend.position = "right"),
       filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "fixedPixels", "results_meanAbsCohortDevVegTypeCN.tiff"),
       width = 10, height = 5)

plotSave <- plot_grid(
  plot_grid(plot31 + theme(legend.position = "none", plot.title = element_blank(), plot.subtitle = element_blank()),
            plot31.3 + theme(legend.position = "none", plot.title = element_blank()),
            nrow = 2, axis = "l", align = "v", rel_heights = c(1, 0.7),
            labels = "auto", label_size = 20),
  get_legend(plot31 + theme(legend.direction = "vertical")),
  nrow = 1, rel_widths = c(1, 0.15))
plotSave
ggsave(plot = plotSave, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "fixedPixels", "results_noCohortsSimVsObsTest_MAD_VegTypeCN.tiff"),
       width = 10, height = 10)

rm(plot31.2, plot31.3)
gc()
```

### Mean absolute deviation of simulated no. cohorts with respect to average observed no. cohorts for a given species
```{r simVsObsCohortsDif_species, cache = FALSE}
## Cohorts mean absolute deviation 
## calculate the mean absolute deviation of each stand to the observed average (per veg type) across reps
plotData <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[year == endYear & B > 0 & vegTypeCN %in% unique(ageDataCN$Cover.dendro),
                                  list(noCohorts = length(unique(age))),
                                  by = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex, firePresAbs, speciesCode)]
plotData2 <- copy(ageDataCN[, .(Species, noCohorts, firePresAbs)])
plotData2[grepl("POBA|POTR", Species), speciesCode := "Popu_sp"]  ## collapse populus
plotData2[grepl("ABLA", Species), speciesCode := "Abie_sp"]
plotData2[grepl("PIEN", Species), speciesCode := "Pice_eng"]
plotData2[grepl("PICO", Species), speciesCode := "Pinu_sp"]
plotData2[grepl("PSME", Species), speciesCode := "Pseu_men"]
plotData2 <- plotData2[!is.na(speciesCode)]
plotData2 <- plotData2[, list(avgNoCohortsObs = mean(noCohorts, na.rm = TRUE)),
                       by = .(speciesCode, firePresAbs)]
plotData <- plotData2[plotData, on = c("speciesCode", "firePresAbs")]
plotData <- plotData[!is.na(avgNoCohortsObs) & !is.na(noCohorts)]
plotData2 <- plotData[, list(meanAbsDevSimObs = 1/.N * sum(abs(noCohorts - mean(avgNoCohortsObs)), na.rm = TRUE)),
                      by = .(scenario, rep, speciesCode, firePresAbs)]

## differences
plot31.5 <- ggplot(plotData,
                   aes(x = speciesCode,
                       y = noCohorts - avgNoCohortsObs,
                       fill = scenario)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey") +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = speciesLabels) +
  scale_fill_discrete(labels = scenLabels) +
  labs(title = "Avg differences from observed no. cohorts",
       y = expression("sim." - bar("obs.")), x = "") +
  facet_grid(~ firePresAbs,
             labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels, firePresAbs = c("0" = "no fire", "1" = "fire")))

## mean absolute deviation across reps
plot31.6 <- ggplot(plotData2,
                   aes(x = speciesCode, y = meanAbsDevSimObs,
                       colour = scenario)) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = "mean_sdl", position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom") +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted"),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, max(plotData2$meanAbsDevSimObs))) +
  scale_colour_discrete(labels = scenLabels) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = speciesLabels) +
  labs(title = "Mean abs. deviation from observed no. cohorts",
       y = expression(bar(bgroup("|", "sim." - bar("obs."), "|"))), x = "") +
  coord_flip() +
  facet_grid(~ firePresAbs,
             labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels, firePresAbs = c("0" = "no fire", "1" = "fire")))
```

```{r plot&savePlots12, echo = FALSE}
plot31.5
ggsave(plot = plot31.5 + theme(legend.position = "right"),
       filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "results_meanCohortDiffSpecies.tiff"),
       width = 14, height = 7)
plot31.6
ggsave(plot = plot31.6 + theme(legend.position = "right"),
       filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "results_meanAbsCohortDevSpecies.tiff"),
       width = 10, height = 5)

plotSave <- plot_grid(
  plot_grid(plot31.4 + theme(legend.position = "none", plot.title = element_blank(), plot.subtitle = element_blank()),
            plot31.6 + theme(legend.position = "none", plot.title = element_blank()),
            nrow = 2, axis = "l", align = "v", rel_heights = c(1, 0.7),
            labels = "auto", label_size = 20),
  get_legend(plot29 + theme(legend.direction = "vertical")),
  nrow = 1, rel_widths = c(1, 0.15))
plotSave
ggsave(plot = plotSave, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "results_noCohortsSimVsObsTest_MAD_Species.tiff"),
       width = 10, height = 10)

gc()
```

### Mean absolute deviation simulated age with respect to average observed age for a given stand type
(typical MAD, and quantile deviations - 50, 75, 95%)
Forest types are defined at the LAST year of the simulation and pixels are kept constant.
```{r simVsObsAgesDif, cache = FALSE}
## mean age differences
## calculate avg weighted ages across observed stands first
## then the absolute difference of each stand to the observed average (per veg type) across reps
pixelIDs <- unique(allPixelCohortDataMnt[year == endYear, .(scenario, rep, vegTypeCN, pixelIndex)])

plotData <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[pixelIDs, on = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex)]
plotData[, vegTypeCN := i.vegTypeCN]
plotData[, i.vegTypeCN := NULL]
plotData <- plotData[year == endYear & vegTypeCN %in% unique(ageDataCN$Cover.dendro),
                     list(AgeBySppWeighted = as.numeric(sum(age * (B/100), na.rm = TRUE) /
                                                          sum((B/100), na.rm = TRUE))),
                     by = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex, firePresAbs, vegTypeCN)]

plotData2 <- ageDataCN[, list(avgAgeBySppObs = mean(Reconstructed.age, na.rm = TRUE)),
                       by = .(Cover.dendro, firePresAbs)]
plotData <- plotData2[plotData, on = c("Cover.dendro==vegTypeCN", "firePresAbs")]
setnames(plotData, "Cover.dendro", "vegTypeCN")
plotData <- plotData[!is.na(avgAgeBySppObs) & !is.na(AgeBySppWeighted)]
plotData2 <- plotData[, list(meanAbsDevSimObs = 1/.N * sum(abs(AgeBySppWeighted - mean(avgAgeBySppObs)))),
                      by = .(scenario, rep, vegTypeCN, firePresAbs)]
plotData2 <- rbind(plotData2,
                   plotData[, list(meanAbsDevSimObs = 1/.N * sum(abs(AgeBySppWeighted - mean(avgAgeBySppObs))),
                                   vegTypeCN = "landscape"),
                            by = .(scenario, rep, firePresAbs)])

## differences
plot32 <- ggplot(plotData,
                 aes(x = vegTypeCN,
                     y = AgeBySppWeighted - avgAgeBySppObs,
                     fill = scenario)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey") +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = vegTypeCNLabels) +
  scale_fill_discrete(labels = scenLabels) +
  labs(title = "Avg. differences from observed ages",
       y = expression("sim." - bar("obs.")), x = "") +
  facet_grid(~ firePresAbs,
             labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels, firePresAbs = c("0" = "no fire", "1" = "fire")))

## mean absolute differences
plot32.2 <- ggplot(plotData2,
                   aes(x = vegTypeCN, y = meanAbsDevSimObs,
                       colour = scenario)) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = "mean_ci", position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom") +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted"),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, max(plotData2$meanAbsDevSimObs))) +
  scale_colour_discrete(labels = scenLabels) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = vegTypeCNLabels, 
                   limits = unique(c("landscape", sort(unique(plotData2$vegTypeCN))))) +
  labs(title = "Mean abs. deviation from observed ages",
       y = expression(bar(bgroup("|", "sim." - bar("obs."), "|"))), x = "") +
  coord_flip() +
  facet_grid(~ firePresAbs,
             labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels, firePresAbs = c("0" = "no fire", "1" = "fire")))


## forest-type-level differences between simulated and observed upper quuantiles
pixelIDs <- unique(allPixelCohortDataMnt[year == endYear, .(scenario, rep, vegTypeCN, pixelIndex)])

plotData <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[pixelIDs, on = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex)]
plotData[, vegTypeCN := i.vegTypeCN]
plotData[, i.vegTypeCN := NULL]

plotData <- plotData[year == endYear & B > 0,  ## absences can't lower the average ages
                     list(AgeBySppWeighted = as.numeric(sum(age * (B/100), na.rm = TRUE) /
                                                          sum((B/100), na.rm = TRUE))),
                     by = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex, firePresAbs, vegTypeCN)]
plotData <- plotData[, list(quant50AgeBySpp = quantile(AgeBySppWeighted, probs = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE),
                            quant75AgeBySpp = quantile(AgeBySppWeighted, probs = 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
                            quant95AgeBySpp = quantile(AgeBySppWeighted, probs = 0.95, na.rm = TRUE)),
                     by = .(scenario, rep, firePresAbs, vegTypeCN)]

plotData2 <- ageDataCN[, list(quant50AgeBySppObs = quantile(Reconstructed.age, probs = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE),
                              quant75AgeBySppObs = quantile(Reconstructed.age, probs = 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
                              quant95AgeBySppObs = quantile(Reconstructed.age, probs = 0.95, na.rm = TRUE)), 
                       by = .(Cover.dendro, firePresAbs)]
plotData <- plotData2[plotData, on = c("Cover.dendro==vegTypeCN", "firePresAbs")]
setnames(plotData, "Cover.dendro", "vegTypeCN")
plotData[, firePresAbs := as.factor(firePresAbs)]
plotData <- plotData[!is.na(quant50AgeBySppObs)]
if (any(is.na(plotData))) stop()

plotData2 <- plotData[, list(meanAbsDevSimObsQuant50 = 1/.N * sum(abs(quant50AgeBySpp - quant50AgeBySppObs)),
                             meanAbsDevSimObsQuant75 = 1/.N * sum(abs(quant75AgeBySpp - quant75AgeBySppObs)),
                             meanAbsDevSimObsQuant95 = 1/.N * sum(abs(quant95AgeBySpp - quant95AgeBySppObs))),
                      by = .(scenario, rep, vegTypeCN, firePresAbs)]
temp <- plotData[, list(meanAbsDevSimObsQuant50 = 1/.N * sum(abs(quant50AgeBySpp - quant50AgeBySppObs)),
                        meanAbsDevSimObsQuant75 = 1/.N * sum(abs(quant75AgeBySpp - quant75AgeBySppObs)),
                        meanAbsDevSimObsQuant95 = 1/.N * sum(abs(quant95AgeBySpp - quant95AgeBySppObs)),
                        vegTypeCN = "landscape"),
                 by = .(scenario, rep, firePresAbs)]
plotData2 <- rbind(plotData2, temp)
plotData2 <- melt(plotData2, id.vars = c("scenario", "rep", "vegTypeCN", "firePresAbs"))

plot32.3 <- ggplot(plotData2, 
                   aes(x = vegTypeCN, y = value, colour = variable, 
                       shape = scenario)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey") +
  stat_summary(fun.data = "mean_ci", position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
               alpha = 0.7, fill = "white") +
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "viridis", begin = 0.3, end = 0.8, 
                        labels = c("meanAbsDevSimObsQuant50" = "50%", 
                                   "meanAbsDevSimObsQuant75" = "75%", 
                                   "meanAbsDevSimObsQuant95" = "95%"),
                        name = "Quantile: ") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = vegTypeCNLabels, 
                   limits = unique(c("landscape", sort(unique(plotData2$vegTypeCN)))),
                   expand = c(-0.2, 1.1)) +
  scale_shape_manual(labels = scenLabels, values = c("PM" = 24, "noPM" = 19)) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom") +
  theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted"),
        panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  labs(title = "Quantile absolute deviation", shape = "",
       y = expression(bgroup("|", "quant."["sim."] - "quant."["obs."], "|")), x = "") +
  coord_flip() +
  facet_wrap(~ firePresAbs, scales = "free_x", 
             labeller = labeller(firePresAbs = c("0" = "no fire", "1" = "fire")))

## only pixels with fire
## order veg types, with landscape at the end
factorLevs <- c(as.character(sort(setdiff(unique(plotData2$vegTypeCN), "landscape"))), "landscape")
plotData2[, vegTypeCN := factor(vegTypeCN, levels = factorLevs)]

plot32.4 <- ggplot(plotData2[firePresAbs == "1"], 
                   aes(x = variable, y = value, colour = scenario, 
                       shape = scenario)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey") +
  stat_summary(fun.data = "mean_ci", position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
               size = 1) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("meanAbsDevSimObsQuant50" = "50%", 
                              "meanAbsDevSimObsQuant75" = "75%", 
                              "meanAbsDevSimObsQuant95" = "95%")) +
  scale_shape_discrete(labels = scenLabels, name = "") +
  scale_color_discrete(labels = scenLabels, name = "") +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom") +
  theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted"),
        panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted"),
        strip.background = element_blank()) +
  labs(title = "Quantile absolute deviation", x = "", 
       y = expression(bgroup("|", "quant."["sim."] - "quant."["obs."], "|"))) +
  facet_wrap(~ vegTypeCN, scales = "free_x", ncol = 4,
             labeller = labeller(vegTypeCN = vegTypeCNLabels))

```

```{r plot&savePlots13, echo = FALSE}
plot32
ggsave(plot = plot32 + theme(legend.position = "right"),
       filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "fixedPixels", "results_meanAgeDiffVegTypeCN.tiff"),
       width = 14, height = 7)
plot32.2
ggsave(plot = plot32.2 + theme(legend.position = "right"),
       filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "fixedPixels", "results_meanAbsAgeDevVegTypeCN.tiff"),
       width = 10, height = 5)
plot32.3
ggsave(plot = plot32.3 + theme(legend.position = "right"),
       filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "fixedPixels", "results_MADquantVegTypeCNs.tiff"),
       width = 10, height = 6)

plotSave <- plot_grid(
  plot_grid(plot29.2 + theme(legend.position = "none", plot.title = element_blank(), plot.subtitle = element_blank()),
            plot30.2 + theme(legend.position = "none", plot.title = element_blank()),
            nrow = 1, rel_widths = c(1, 0.7), axis = "b", align = "h",
            labels = "auto", label_size = 20),
  plot_grid(plot32.2 + theme(legend.position = "none", plot.title = element_blank()),
            get_legend(plot29.2 + theme(legend.direction = "vertical")),
            nrow = 1, rel_widths = c(1, 0.7), axis = "t", align = "v",
            labels = c("c", ""), label_size = 20),
  nrow = 2, rel_heights = c(1, 0.7), axis = "l", align = "h")
plotSave
ggsave(plot = plotSave, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "fixedPixels", "results_ageSimVsObsTest_MAD_VegTypeCN.tiff"),
       width = 12, height = 10)

plotSave <- plot_grid(
  plot_grid(plot29.2 + theme(legend.position = "none", plot.title = element_blank(), plot.subtitle = element_blank()),
            plot30.2 + theme(legend.position = "bottom", plot.title = element_blank()),
            nrow = 1, 
            rel_widths = c(1, 0.7),
            axis = "b", align = "h",
            labels = c("a", "b", ""), label_size = 20),
  plot_grid(plot32.3 + theme(legend.position = "right",
                             plot.title = element_blank(),
                             legend.direction = "vertical",
                             legend.box = "vertical"),
            labels = c("c"), label_size = 20),
  nrow = 2, rel_heights = c(0.8, 1), axis = "l", align = "h")
plotSave
ggsave(plot = plotSave, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "fixedPixels", "results_ageSimVsObsTest_MADquant_VegTypeCN.tiff"),
       width = 10, height = 10)

plotSave <- plot_grid(
  plot_grid(plot29.3 + theme(legend.position = "none", plot.title = element_blank(), plot.subtitle = element_blank()),
            plot30.3 + theme(legend.position = "right", plot.title = element_blank(), plot.subtitle = element_blank()),
            nrow = 1, 
            axis = "b", align = "h",
            labels = c("a", "b", ""), label_size = 20),
  plot_grid(plot32.4 + theme(legend.position = "right",
                             plot.title = element_blank(),
                             legend.direction = "vertical",
                             legend.box = "vertical"),
            labels = c("c"), label_size = 20),
  nrow = 2, rel_heights = c(0.8, 1), axis = "lr", align = "v")
plotSave
ggsave(plot = plotSave, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "fixedPixels", "results_ageSimVsObsTest_MADquant_VegTypeCN2.tiff"),
       width = 10, height = 10)

gc()
```

### Mean absolute deviation simulated age with respect to average observed age for a given species
(typical MAD, and quantile deviations - 50, 75, 95%)
```{r simVsObsAgesDif2, cache = FALSE}
## mean age differences
## calculate avg weighted ages across observed stands first
## then the absolute difference of each stand to the observed average (per veg type) across reps
plotData <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[year == endYear & vegTypeCN %in% unique(ageDataCN$Cover.dendro),
                                  list(AgeBySppWeighted = as.numeric(sum(age * (B/100), na.rm = TRUE) /
                                                                       sum((B/100), na.rm = TRUE))),
                                  by = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex, firePresAbs, speciesCode)]

plotData2 <- copy(ageDataCN[, .(Species, Reconstructed.age, firePresAbs)])
plotData2[grepl("POBA|POTR", Species), speciesCode := "Popu_sp"]  ## collapse populus
plotData2[grepl("ABLA", Species), speciesCode := "Abie_sp"]
plotData2[grepl("PIEN", Species), speciesCode := "Pice_eng"]
plotData2[grepl("PICO", Species), speciesCode := "Pinu_sp"]
plotData2[grepl("PSME", Species), speciesCode := "Pseu_men"]
plotData2 <- plotData2[!is.na(speciesCode)]
plotData2 <- plotData2[, list(avgAgeBySppObs = mean(Reconstructed.age, na.rm = TRUE)),
                       by = .(speciesCode, firePresAbs)]

plotData <- plotData2[plotData, on = .(speciesCode, firePresAbs)]
plotData <- plotData[!is.na(avgAgeBySppObs) & !is.na(AgeBySppWeighted)]
plotData2 <- plotData[, list(meanAbsDevSimObs = 1/.N * sum(abs(AgeBySppWeighted - mean(avgAgeBySppObs)))),
                      by = .(scenario, rep, speciesCode, firePresAbs)]

temp <- plotData[, list(meanAbsDevSimObs = 1/.N * sum(abs(AgeBySppWeighted - mean(avgAgeBySppObs))),
                        speciesCode = "landscape"),
                 by = .(scenario, rep, firePresAbs)]
plotData2 <- rbind(plotData2, temp)

## differences
plot43 <- ggplot(plotData,
                 aes(x = speciesCode,
                     y = AgeBySppWeighted - avgAgeBySppObs,
                     fill = scenario)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey") +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = speciesLabels) +
  scale_fill_discrete(labels = scenLabels) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  labs(title = "Avg. differences from observed ages",
       y = expression("sim." - bar("obs.")), x = "") +
  facet_grid(~ firePresAbs,
             labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels, firePresAbs = c("0" = "no fire", "1" = "fire")))

## mean absolute differences
plot43.2 <- ggplot(plotData2,
                   aes(x = speciesCode, y = meanAbsDevSimObs,
                       colour = scenario)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey") +
  stat_summary(fun.data = "mean_ci", position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom") +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted"),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c(speciesLabels, landscape = "landscape"), 
                   limits = c("landscape", names(speciesLabels))) +
  scale_colour_discrete(labels = scenLabels) +
  labs(title = "Mean abs. deviation from observed ages",
       y = expression(bar(bgroup("|", "sim." - bar("obs."), "|"))), x = "") +
  coord_flip() +
  facet_grid(~ firePresAbs,
             labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels, firePresAbs = c("0" = "no fire", "1" = "fire")))


## species-level differences between simulated and observed upper quuantiles
plotData <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[year == endYear & B > 0,  ## absences can't lower the average ages
                                  list(AgeBySppWeighted = as.numeric(sum(age * (B/100), na.rm = TRUE) /
                                                                       sum((B/100), na.rm = TRUE))),
                                  by = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex, firePresAbs, speciesCode)]
plotData <- plotData[, list(quant50AgeBySpp = quantile(AgeBySppWeighted, probs = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE),
                            quant75AgeBySpp = quantile(AgeBySppWeighted, probs = 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
                            quant95AgeBySpp = quantile(AgeBySppWeighted, probs = 0.95, na.rm = TRUE)),
                     by = .(scenario, rep, firePresAbs, speciesCode)]

plotData2 <- copy(ageDataCN[, .(Species, Reconstructed.age, firePresAbs)])
plotData2[grepl("POBA|POTR", Species), speciesCode := "Popu_sp"]  ## collapse populus
plotData2[grepl("ABLA", Species), speciesCode := "Abie_sp"]
plotData2[grepl("PIEN", Species), speciesCode := "Pice_eng"]
plotData2[grepl("PICO", Species), speciesCode := "Pinu_sp"]
plotData2[grepl("PSME", Species), speciesCode := "Pseu_men"]
plotData2 <- plotData2[!is.na(speciesCode)]

plotData2 <- plotData2[, list(quant50AgeBySppObs = quantile(Reconstructed.age, probs = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE),
                              quant75AgeBySppObs = quantile(Reconstructed.age, probs = 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
                              quant95AgeBySppObs = quantile(Reconstructed.age, probs = 0.95, na.rm = TRUE)), 
                       by = .(speciesCode, firePresAbs)]
plotData <- plotData2[plotData, on = .(speciesCode, firePresAbs)]
plotData[, firePresAbs := as.factor(firePresAbs)]
plotData <- plotData[!is.na(quant50AgeBySppObs)]
if (any(is.na(plotData))) stop()

plotData2 <- plotData[, list(meanAbsDevSimObsQuant50 = 1/.N * sum(abs(quant50AgeBySpp - quant50AgeBySppObs)),
                             meanAbsDevSimObsQuant75 = 1/.N * sum(abs(quant75AgeBySpp - quant75AgeBySppObs)),
                             meanAbsDevSimObsQuant95 = 1/.N * sum(abs(quant95AgeBySpp - quant95AgeBySppObs))),
                      by = .(scenario, rep, speciesCode, firePresAbs)]
temp <- plotData[, list(meanAbsDevSimObsQuant50 = 1/.N * sum(abs(quant50AgeBySpp - quant50AgeBySppObs)),
                        meanAbsDevSimObsQuant75 = 1/.N * sum(abs(quant75AgeBySpp - quant75AgeBySppObs)),
                        meanAbsDevSimObsQuant95 = 1/.N * sum(abs(quant95AgeBySpp - quant95AgeBySppObs)),
                        speciesCode = "landscape"),
                 by = .(scenario, rep, firePresAbs)]
plotData2 <- rbind(plotData2, temp)

plotData2 <- melt(plotData2, id.vars = c("scenario", "rep", "speciesCode", "firePresAbs"))

plot43.3 <- ggplot(plotData2, 
                   aes(x = speciesCode, y = value, colour = variable, 
                       shape = scenario)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey") +
  stat_summary(fun.data = "mean_ci", position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
               alpha = 0.7, fill = "white") +
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "viridis", begin = 0.3, end = 0.8, 
                        labels = c("meanAbsDevSimObsQuant50" = "50%", 
                                   "meanAbsDevSimObsQuant75" = "75%", 
                                   "meanAbsDevSimObsQuant95" = "95%"),
                        name = "Quantile: ") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = speciesLabels,
                   limits = unique(c("landscape", sort(plotData2$speciesCode))),
                   expand = c(-0.2, 1.1)) +
  scale_shape_manual(labels = scenLabels, values = c("PM" = 24, "noPM" = 19)) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom") +
  theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted"),
        panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  labs(title = "Quantile absolute deviation", shape = "",
       y = expression(bgroup("|", "quant."["sim."] - "quant."["obs."], "|")), x = "") +
  coord_flip() +
  facet_wrap(~ firePresAbs, scales = "free_x", 
             labeller = labeller(firePresAbs = c("0" = "no fire", "1" = "fire")))

## only pixels with fire
## order veg types, with landscape at the end
factorLevs <- c(as.character(sort(setdiff(unique(plotData2$speciesCode), "landscape"))), "landscape")
plotData2[, speciesCode := factor(speciesCode, levels = factorLevs)]

plot43.4 <- ggplot(plotData2[firePresAbs == "1"], 
                   aes(x = variable, y = value, colour = scenario, 
                       shape = scenario)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey") +
  stat_summary(fun.data = "mean_ci", position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
               size = 1) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("meanAbsDevSimObsQuant50" = "50%", 
                              "meanAbsDevSimObsQuant75" = "75%", 
                              "meanAbsDevSimObsQuant95" = "95%")) +
  scale_shape_discrete(labels = scenLabels, name = "") +
  scale_color_discrete(labels = scenLabels, name = "") +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom") +
  theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted"),
        panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted"),
        strip.background = element_blank()) +
  labs(title = "Quantile absolute deviation", x = "", 
       y = expression(bgroup("|", "quant."["sim."] - "quant."["obs."], "|"))) +
  facet_wrap(~ speciesCode, scales = "free_x", ncol = 3,
             labeller = labeller(speciesCode = c(speciesLabels, landscape = "landscape")))
```

```{r plot&savePlots14, echo = FALSE}
plot43
ggsave(plot = plot43 + theme(legend.position = "right"),
       filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "results_meanAgeDiffSpecies.tiff"),
       width = 14, height = 7)
plot43.2
ggsave(plot = plot43.2 + theme(legend.position = "right"),
       filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "results_meanAbsAgeDevSpecies.tiff"),
       width = 10, height = 5)

plot43.3
ggsave(plot = plot43.3 + theme(legend.position = "right"),
       filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "results_MADquantSpecies.tiff"),
       width = 10, height = 5)

plotSave <- plot_grid(plot_grid(plot43 + theme(legend.position = "none"),
                                plotTest1.2 + theme(legend.position = "none"),
                                ncol = 2, nrow = 1, align = "h", axis = "b",
                                labels = "auto", font.label = list(size = 20)), 
                      get_legend(plot43 + theme(legend.direction = "vertical")),
                      ncol = 2, nrow = 1, rel_widths = c(1, 0.15))
plotSave
ggsave(plot = plotSave, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "results_meanAbsAgeDev_ageSimVsObsTestSpecies.tiff"),
       width = 15, height = 7)

plotSave <- plot_grid(
  plot_grid(plot29 + theme(legend.position = "none", plot.title = element_blank(), plot.subtitle = element_blank()),
            plot30 + theme(legend.position = "none", plot.title = element_blank()),
            nrow = 1, rel_widths = c(1, 0.7), axis = "b", align = "h",
            labels = "auto", label_size = 20),
  plot_grid(plot43.2 + theme(legend.position = "none", plot.title = element_blank()),
            get_legend(plot29 + theme(legend.direction = "vertical")),
            nrow = 1, rel_widths = c(1, 0.7), axis = "t", align = "v",
            labels = c("c", ""), label_size = 20),
  nrow = 2, rel_heights = c(1, 0.7), axis = "l", align = "h")
plotSave
ggsave(plot = plotSave, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "results_ageSimVsObsTest_MAD_Species.tiff"),
       width = 10, height = 10)

plotSave <- plot_grid(
  plot_grid(plot29 + theme(legend.position = "none", plot.title = element_blank(), plot.subtitle = element_blank()),
            plot30 + theme(legend.position = "bottom", plot.title = element_blank()),
            nrow = 1, 
            rel_widths = c(1, 0.7),
            axis = "b", align = "h",
            labels = c("a", "b", ""), label_size = 20),
  plot_grid(plot43.3 + theme(legend.position = "right",
                             plot.title = element_blank(),
                             legend.direction = "vertical",
                             legend.box = "vertical"),
            labels = c("c"), label_size = 20),
  nrow = 2, rel_heights = c(0.8, 1), axis = "l", align = "h")
plotSave
ggsave(plot = plotSave, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "results_ageSimVsObsTest_MADquant_Species.tiff"),
       width = 10, height = 10)


plotSave <- plot_grid(
  plot_grid(plot29.1 + theme(legend.position = "none", plot.title = element_blank(), plot.subtitle = element_blank()),
            plot30.1 + theme(legend.position = "bottom", plot.title = element_blank(), plot.subtitle = element_blank()),
            nrow = 1, 
            axis = "b", align = "h",
            labels = c("a", "b", ""), label_size = 20),
  plot_grid(plot43.4 + theme(legend.position = "right",
                             plot.title = element_blank(),
                             legend.direction = "vertical",
                             legend.box = "vertical"),
            labels = c("c"), label_size = 20),
  nrow = 2, rel_heights = c(0.8, 1), axis = "lr", align = "h")
plotSave
ggsave(plot = plotSave, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "results_ageSimVsObsTest_MADquant_Species2.tiff"),
       width = 10, height = 10)

# rm(plot43, plot43.2, plotTest1.2)
gc()
```

### No. fires, fire frequency, fire size and fire severity
```{r simVsObsFires, cache = FALSE}
## fire size distribution
plot37 <- ggplot(summaryFireAttributes,
                 aes(x = meanPatchS + 0.1, fill = scenario, alpha = scenario)) +
  geom_density(adjust = 1.5) +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("PM" = 0.6, "noPM" = 1), guide = "none") +
  scale_x_log10() +
  scale_fill_discrete(labels = scenLabels) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 14, legend = "bottom") +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  labs(title = "Fire mean patch size distribution", 
       x = "Mean patch size (no. pixels)")

plot37.2 <- ggplot(summaryFireAttributes,
                   aes(x = meanPatchS + 0.1, fill = scenario, alpha = scenario)) +
  geom_density(adjust = 1.5) +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("PM" = 0.6, "noPM" = 1), guide = "none") +
  scale_x_log10() +
  scale_fill_discrete(labels = scenLabels) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 14, legend = "bottom") +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  labs(title = "Fire mean patch size distribution", 
       x = "Patch size (no. pixels)") +
  facet_wrap(~ vegTypeCN, ncol = 4, labeller = labeller(vegTypeCN = vegTypeCNLabels))

## average no. of pixels with certain fire frequency
plotData <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[, list(noPixels = length(unique(pixelIndex))),
                                  by = .(scenario, rep, noFires)]
plotData2 <- plotData[, list(rep = 2, scenario = scenario, noFires = noFires, noPixels = noPixels * runif(1, 0, 1))]
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
plot38 <- ggplot(plotData,
                 aes(x = as.factor(noFires), y = noPixels, fill = scenario)) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "bar", position = "dodge", alpha = 0.5) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = "mean_sdl", aes(colour = scenario),
               geom = "errorbar", position = "dodge", show.legend = FALSE) +
  stat_summary(aes(label = round(..y..), colour = scenario),
               fun = "mean", geom = "text", show.legend = FALSE,
               position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), vjust = -1) +
  scale_fill_discrete(labels = scenLabels) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom") +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  labs(x = "no. fires", y = "no. pixels")


## mean fire interval per forest type - to compare with camerons fire intervals.
plotData <- rbind(summaryFireAttributes[meanFreq > 0, .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex, meanFreq, vegTypeCN)], 
                  summaryFireAttributes[meanFreq > 0, list(meanFreq = mean(meanFreq, na.rm = TRUE),
                                                           vegTypeCN = "landscape"), 
                                        by = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex)])
plotData2 <- rbind(unique(ageDataCN[firePresAbs > 0, .(Cover.dendro, mean.FI, Patch.ID)]),
                   ageDataCN[firePresAbs > 0, list(mean.FI = mean(mean.FI, na.rm = TRUE),
                                                   Cover.dendro = "landscape"),
                             by = .(Patch.ID)])
plot39 <- ggplot() +
  geom_violin(data = plotData,
              aes(x = vegTypeCN, y = meanFreq, fill = scenario, 
                  colour = scenario),
              alpha = 0.3,
              position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
  stat_summary(data = plotData,
               aes(x = vegTypeCN, y = meanFreq, colour = scenario), 
               fun.data = "mean_cl_boot", geom = "pointrange", 
               position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
  geom_violin(data = plotData2,
              aes(x = Cover.dendro, y = mean.FI, fill = "observed", 
                  colour = "observed"),
              alpha = 0.3,
              position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
  stat_summary(data = plotData2,
               aes(x = Cover.dendro, y = mean.FI, colour = "observed"),
               fun.data = "mean_cl_boot", geom = "pointrange",
               position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = vegTypeCNLabels) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("noPM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[1], "PM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[2], 
                                 "observed" = "grey50")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("noPM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[1], "PM" = scales::hue_pal()(2)[2], 
                               "observed" = "grey50"),
                    labels = c(scenLabels, "observed" = "observed")) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  labs(title = "Mean fire interval", subtitle = "by forest type",
       y = "Fire interval", x = "", colour = "")

## only simulated fire intervals
plot39.3 <- ggplot(data = summaryFireAttributes,
                   aes(x = meanFreq, fill = scenario, alpha = scenario)) +
  geom_density() +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("PM" = 0.6, "noPM" = 1), guide = "none") +
  scale_fill_discrete(labels = scenLabels) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 14, legend = "bottom") +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  labs(x = "Mean fire interval", colour = "")

plot39.4 <- ggplot(data = summaryFireAttributes,
                   aes(x = meanFreq, fill = scenario, alpha = scenario)) +
  geom_density() +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("PM" = 0.6, "noPM" = 1), guide = "none") +
  scale_fill_discrete(labels = scenLabels) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 14, legend = "bottom") +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  labs(x = "Mean fire interval", colour = "") + 
  facet_wrap(~ vegTypeCN, ncol = 4, labeller = labeller(vegTypeCN = vegTypeCNLabels))

## distribution of fire severity per stand across landscape
plot40 <- ggplot(data = summaryFireAttributes) +
  geom_density(aes(x = meanSevB + 0.1, fill = scenario, alpha = scenario)) +
  scale_x_log10() +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("PM" = 0.6, "noPM" = 1), guide = "none") +
  scale_fill_discrete(labels = scenLabels) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 14, legend = "bottom") +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  labs(x = "Mean fire severity\n(biomass lost, ton/ha)", colour = "")

## distribution of fire severity per stand by veg types DEFINED AT YEAR 1
## as used for HVs
plot41 <- ggplot(data = summaryFireAttributes) +
  geom_density(aes(x = meanSevB + 0.1, fill = scenario, alpha = scenario)) +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("PM" = 0.6, "noPM" = 1), guide = "none") +
  scale_fill_discrete(labels = scenLabels) +
  scale_x_log10() +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 14, legend = "bottom") +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  labs(x = "Mean fire severity\n(biomass lost, ton/ha)", colour = "") +
  facet_wrap(~ vegTypeCN, ncol = 4, labeller = labeller(vegTypeCN = vegTypeCNLabels))

## distribution of fire severity by veg types defined every year
## so not always the same pixels
plotData <- unique(allPixelCohortDataMnt[, .(scenario, rep, year, pixelIndex, vegTypeCN)])
plotData <- summaryFireAttributes[, .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex, meanSevB)][plotData, on = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex)]
plot42 <- ggplot(data = plotData) +
  geom_density(aes(x = log(meanSevB + 1), fill = scenario, alpha = scenario)) +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("PM" = 0.6, "noPM" = 1), guide = "none") +
  scale_fill_discrete(labels = scenLabels) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom") +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  labs(x = "Mean fire severity\n(log-biomass lost, ton/ha)", colour = "") +
  facet_wrap(~ vegTypeCN, ncol = 4, labeller = labeller(vegTypeCN = vegTypeCNLabels))
```

```{r plot&savePlots15, echo = FALSE}
plotSave <- ggarrange(plot37 + theme(plot.title = element_blank()), 
                      plot37.2 + theme(plot.title = element_blank()),
                      widths = c(0.5, 1),
                      font.label = list(size = 20),
                      labels = "auto", common.legend = TRUE, legend = "bottom")
ggsave(plotSave, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "fixedPixels", "results_meanPatchSizeDist.tiff"),
       width = 16, height = 6)
ggsave(plot = plot38 + theme(legend.position = c(0.9, 0.9), legend.background = element_blank()),
       filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "results_noPixelsVsnoFires.tiff"),
       width = 8, height = 7)
ggsave(plot = plot39, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "results_meanFireIntSimVsObs.tiff"),
       width = 10, height = 8)
plotSave <- ggarrange(plot39.3 + theme(plot.title = element_blank()), 
                      plot39.4 + theme(plot.title = element_blank()),
                      widths = c(0.5, 1),
                      font.label = list(size = 20),
                      labels = "auto", common.legend = TRUE, legend = "bottom")
ggsave(plotSave, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "results_meanFireIntDist.tiff"),
       width = 16, height = 6)

plotSave <- ggarrange(plot40 + theme(plot.title = element_blank()), 
                      plot41 + theme(plot.title = element_blank()),
                      widths = c(0.5, 1),
                      font.label = list(size = 20),
                      labels = "auto", common.legend = TRUE, legend = "bottom")
ggsave(plotSave, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "fixedPixels", "results_meanSevDist.tiff"),
       width = 16, height = 6)

ggsave(plot = plot42 + theme(legend.position = c(0.9, 0.1), legend.background = element_blank()),
       filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "results_meanSevDistVegTypeCN.tiff"),
       width = 10, height = 8)

plotSave <- ggarrange(plot37 + theme(plot.title = element_blank()),
                      plot37.2 + theme(plot.title = element_blank()),
                      plot39.3, 
                      plot39.4 + theme(plot.title = element_blank()),
                      plot40, 
                      plot41 + theme(plot.title = element_blank()),
                      common.legend = TRUE, legend = "bottom",
                      nrow = 3, ncol = 2, widths = c(0.5, 1),
                      font.label = list(size = 20),
                      labels = "auto", align = "hv")
ggsave(plot = plotSave,
       filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "fixedPixels", "results_fireAttrLandscape.tiff"),
       width = 16, height = 12)

```

### Mean absolute deviation simulated fire intervals with respect to observed fire intervals for a given stand type
```{r simVsObsAgesDif3, cache = FALSE}
## mean age differences
## calculate avg weighted ages across observed stands first
## then the absolute difference of each stand to the observed average (per veg type) across reps
plotData <- summaryFireAttributes[meanFreq > 0]
plotData2 <- ageDataCN[firePresAbs > 0, list(avgMean.FIObs = mean(mean.FI, na.rm = TRUE)),
                       by = .(Cover.dendro)]
plotData <- plotData2[plotData, on = c("Cover.dendro==vegTypeCN")]
setnames(plotData, "Cover.dendro", "vegTypeCN")
plotData <- plotData[!is.na(avgMean.FIObs) & !is.na(meanFreq)]
plotData2 <- plotData[, list(meanAbsDevSimObs = 1/.N * sum(abs(meanFreq - mean(avgMean.FIObs)))),
                      by = .(scenario, rep, vegTypeCN)]

plotData2 <- rbind(plotData2, plotData[, list(meanAbsDevSimObs = 1/.N * sum(abs(meanFreq - mean(avgMean.FIObs))),
                                              vegTypeCN = "landscape"),
                                       by = .(scenario, rep)])

## differences
plot44 <- ggplot(plotData,
                 aes(x = vegTypeCN,
                     y = meanFreq - avgMean.FIObs,
                     fill = scenario)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey") +
  geom_boxplot() +
  scale_fill_discrete(labels = scenLabels) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = vegTypeCNLabels) +
  labs(title = "Avg. differences from observed fire intervals",
       y = expression("sim." - bar("obs.")), x = "")

## mean absolute differences
plot44.2 <- ggplot(plotData2,
                   aes(x = vegTypeCN, y = meanAbsDevSimObs,
                       colour = scenario)) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = "mean_sdl", position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom") +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, max(plotData2$meanAbsDevSimObs))) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = vegTypeCNLabels, limits = rev(names(vegTypeCNLabels))) +
  scale_colour_discrete(labels = scenLabels) +
  labs(title = "Mean abs. deviation from fire intervals",
       y = expression(bar(bgroup("|", "sim." - bar("obs."), "|"))), x = "") +
  coord_flip()
```

```{r plot&savePlots16, echo = FALSE}
plot44
ggsave(plot = plot44 + theme(legend.position = "right"),
       filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "results_meanFIDiff.tiff"),
       width = 14, height = 7)
plot44.2
ggsave(plot = plot44.2 + theme(legend.position = "right"),
       filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "results_meanAbsFIDev.tiff"),
       width = 10, height = 5)

plotSave <- plot_grid(
  plot_grid(plot39 + theme(plot.title = element_blank(), plot.subtitle = element_blank(), 
                           axis.title.x = element_blank(), legend.position = "none"),
            plot44.2 + theme(plot.title = element_blank(), legend.position = "none"),
            nrow = 1, labels = "auto", label_size = 20, align = "h", axis = "b"),
  get_legend(plot39 + guides(colour = "none", fill = guide_legend(override.aes = list(alpha = 1)))),
  ncol = 1, rel_heights = c(1, 0.1))

ggsave(plot = plotSave, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "results_meanFISimVsObsTest_MAD_VegTypeCN.tiff"),
       width = 12, height = 7)
gc()
```

## ALPHA AND BETA DIVERSITY PLOTS - ACROSS LANDSCAPE
```{r alphaDiv, cache = FALSE}
## BIODIVERSITY METRICS --------------------------------
## ALPHA DIVERSITY --------------
## inverse Simpson concentration (Whittaker 1972)
rm(plotData, plotData2)
amc::.gc()
allPixelCohortDataMnt[, sumB := sum(B, na.rm = TRUE),
                      by = .(scenario, rep, year, pixelIndex, firePresAbs, noFires)]
plotData <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[, list(relB = sum(B, na.rm = TRUE)/sumB),
                                  by = .(scenario, rep, year, pixelIndex, speciesCode, firePresAbs, noFires)]
plotData <- plotData[, list(alphaDiv = 1/sum(relB^2)),
                     by = .(scenario, rep, year, pixelIndex, firePresAbs, noFires)]

plot33 <- ggplot(data = plotData,
                 aes(x = year, y = alphaDiv, colour = scenario)) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "line", size = 1) +
  scale_colour_discrete(labels = scenLabels) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  labs(title = "Avg. alpha-diversity", y = "alpha-div.") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 1.5))) +
  facet_grid(~ firePresAbs,
             labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels, firePresAbs = c("0" = "no fire", "1" = "fire")))

## map of alpha - avg across reps
plotData2 <- plotData[year == endYear, list(alphaDiv = mean(alphaDiv)),
                      by = .(scenario, pixelIndex)]
alphaStk <- lapply(split(plotData2, by = "scenario"), function(DT, RTM) {
  rasAlpha <- RTM
  rasAlpha[] <- NA
  rasAlpha[DT$pixelIndex] <- DT$alphaDiv
  rasAlpha
}, RTM = preSimList$rasterToMatch)
alphaStk <- stack(alphaStk)

rasData <- data.table(vals = getValues(alphaStk), coordinates(alphaStk))
rasData <- rasData[!is.na(vals.noPM)]
rasData[, delta := vals.noPM - vals.PM]
rasData <- melt(rasData, id.vars = c("x", "y", "delta"))
rasData$variable <- sub("vals.", "", rasData$variable)

plotMap1 <- ggplot() +
  layer_spatial(data = preSimList$studyArea, col = "black",
                fill = "transparent") +
  geom_raster(data = rasData,
              mapping = aes(x, y, fill = value)) +
  annotation_north_arrow(style = north_arrow_minimal,
                         height = unit(1, "cm"), width = unit(1, "cm"),
                         location = "tr", which_north = "true") +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16) +
  scale_fill_distiller(palette = "YlGnBu", direction = 1,
                       breaks = c(0:length(unique(allPixelCohortDataMnt$speciesCode))),
                       labels = c(0:length(unique(allPixelCohortDataMnt$speciesCode))),
                       limits = c(0, length(unique(allPixelCohortDataMnt$speciesCode))),
                       na.value = "transparent") +
  labs(x = "longitude", y = "latitude", fill = "alpha-div.") +
  facet_wrap(~ variable)

plotMap1hist <- ggplot(rasData[!is.na(value)]) +
  geom_density(aes(x = value, fill = variable, alpha = variable)) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("PM" = 0.6, "noPM" = 1)) +
  labs(y = "density", x = "alpha-div.")

## delta plot
plotMap1.2 <- ggplot() +
  layer_spatial(data = preSimList$studyArea, col = "black",
                fill = "grey85") +
  geom_raster(data = rasData,
              mapping = aes(x, y, fill = delta)) +
  annotation_north_arrow(style = north_arrow_minimal,
                         height = unit(1, "cm"), width = unit(1, "cm"),
                         location = "tr", which_north = "true") +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16) +
  scale_fill_distiller(palette = "RdBu", direction = 1,
                       na.value = "transparent") +
  labs(x = "longitude", y = "latitude", fill = expression(paste(Delta, "alpha-div.")))
```

```{r betaDiv, cache = FALSE}
## BETA DIVERSITY --------------
## from multiplicative decomposition where both alpha
## and gamma diversity are inverse Simpson concentration (Whittaker 1972)
## alpha-div
plotData <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[, list(relB = sum(B, na.rm = TRUE)/sumB),
                                  by = .(scenario, rep, year, pixelIndex, speciesCode, firePresAbs, noFires)]
plotData <- plotData[, list(alphaDiv = 1/sum(relB^2)),
                     by = .(scenario, rep, year, pixelIndex, firePresAbs, noFires)]

## gamma-div - firePresAbs
plotData2 <- copy(summaryBurnCohortDataSpp)
plotData2[, sumB := sum(BiomassBySpecies, na.rm = TRUE),
          .(scenario, rep, year, firePresAbs)]
plotData2 <- plotData2[, list(relB = sum(BiomassBySpecies, na.rm = TRUE)/sumB),
                       by = .(scenario, rep, year, firePresAbs, speciesCode)]
plotData2 <- plotData2[, list(gammaDiv = 1/sum(relB^2)),
                       by = .(scenario, rep, year, firePresAbs)]

## beta-div  - firePresAbs
plotData2 <- plotData2[plotData, on = .(scenario, rep, year, firePresAbs)]
plotData2 <- plotData2[, list(betaDiv = gammaDiv * sum((1/.N) * (1/alphaDiv), na.rm = TRUE)),
                       by = .(scenario, rep, year, firePresAbs)]

plot35 <- ggplot(data = plotData2,
                 aes(x = year, y = betaDiv, colour = scenario)) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "line", size = 1) +
  scale_colour_discrete(labels = scenLabels) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  labs(title = "Avg. beta-diversity", y = "beta-div.") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 1.5))) +
  facet_grid(~ firePresAbs,
             labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels, firePresAbs = c("0" = "no fire", "1" = "fire")))

## gamma-div - no fires
plotData2 <- copy(summaryBurnCohortDataSpp)
plotData2[, sumB := sum(BiomassBySpecies, na.rm = TRUE),
          .(scenario, rep, year, noFires)]
plotData2 <- plotData2[, list(relB = sum(BiomassBySpecies, na.rm = TRUE)/sumB),
                       by = .(scenario, rep, year, noFires, speciesCode)]
plotData2 <- plotData2[, list(gammaDiv = 1/sum(relB^2)),
                       by = .(scenario, rep, year, noFires)]
## beta-div
plotData2 <- plotData2[plotData, on = .(scenario, rep, year, noFires)]
plotData2 <- plotData2[, list(betaDiv = gammaDiv * sum((1/.N) * (1/alphaDiv), na.rm = TRUE)),
                       by = .(scenario, rep, year, noFires)]

plot36 <- ggplot(data = plotData2,
                 aes(x = year, y = betaDiv, colour = scenario)) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "line", size = 1) +
  scale_colour_discrete(labels = scenLabels) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  labs(title = "Avg. beta-diversity", y = "beta-div.")  +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 1.5))) +
  facet_grid(~ noFires)
```

```{r plot&savePlots17, echo = FALSE}
plotSave <- ggarrange(plot33,
                      plot35, common.legend = TRUE, legend = "top",
                      labels = "auto", font.label = list(size = 20))
plotSave
ggsave(plot = plotSave, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "results_landscapeAlphaBetaScenario.tiff"),
       width = 14, height = 6)

rm(plot33, plot35)
gc()
```

## ALPHA AND BETA DIVERSITY PLOTS - BY VEG TYPE - TIME ONLY
Forest types are defined at the last year of the simulation and pixels are kept constant.
```{r alphaDivVegType, cache = FALSE}
## BIODIVERSITY METRICS --------------------------------
## ALPHA DIVERSITY --------------
## inverse Simpson concentration (Whittaker 1972)
rm(plotData, plotData2)
amc::.gc()
pixelIDs <- unique(allPixelCohortDataMnt[year == endYear, .(vegTypeCN, scenario, rep, pixelIndex)])  

plotData <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[pixelIDs, on = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex)]
plotData[, vegTypeCN := i.vegTypeCN]
plotData[, i.vegTypeCN := NULL]
plotData[, sumB := sum(B, na.rm = TRUE), by = .(scenario, rep, year, pixelIndex)]
plotData <- plotData[, list(relB = sum(B, na.rm = TRUE)/sumB),
                     by = .(scenario, rep, year, pixelIndex, vegTypeCN, speciesCode, firePresAbs, noFires)]
```
