```{r alphaDivVegType, cache = FALSE}
plotData <- plotData[, list(alphaDiv = 1/sum(relB^2)),
                     by = .(scenario, rep, year, pixelIndex, vegTypeCN, firePresAbs, noFires)]

cols2 <- vegTypeCNColours[names(vegTypeCNColours) != "No veg."]
labs2 <- vegTypeCNLabels[names(vegTypeCNLabels) != "No veg."] 
plot33.2 <- ggplot(data = plotData[vegTypeCN != "No veg."],
                   aes(x = year, y = alphaDiv, colour = vegTypeCN)) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "line", size = 1) +
  stat_summary(aes(x = year, y = alphaDiv, colour = "landscape"),
               fun = "mean", geom = "line", size = 1) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = cols2, 
                      labels = labs2, drop = TRUE) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  labs(title = "Avg. alpha-diversity", y = "alpha-div.") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 1.5))) +
  facet_grid(scenario ~ firePresAbs,
             labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels, firePresAbs = c("0" = "no fire", "1" = "fire")))

plot33.3 <- ggplot(data = plotData[vegTypeCN != "No veg."],
                   aes(x = year, y = alphaDiv, colour = vegTypeCN, linetype = scenario)) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "line", size = 1) +
  stat_summary(aes(x = year, y = alphaDiv, colour = "landscape"),
               fun = "mean", geom = "line", size = 1) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = cols2, 
                      labels = labs2, drop = TRUE) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = scenLinetype,
                        labels = scenLabels) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  labs(title = "Avg. alpha-diversity", y = "alpha-div.") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 1.5)))

## BETA DIVERSITY --------------
## from multiplicative decomposition where both alpha
## and gamma diversity are inverse Simpson concentration (Whittaker 1972)
## alpha-div
pixelIDs <- unique(allPixelCohortDataMnt[year == endYear, .(vegTypeCN, scenario, rep, pixelIndex)])  

plotData <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[pixelIDs, on = .(scenario, rep, pixelIndex)]
plotData[, vegTypeCN := i.vegTypeCN]
plotData[, i.vegTypeCN := NULL]
plotData[, sumB := sum(B, na.rm = TRUE), by = .(scenario, rep, year, pixelIndex)]
plotData <- plotData[, list(relB = sum(B, na.rm = TRUE)/sumB),
                     by = .(scenario, rep, year, pixelIndex, vegTypeCN, speciesCode, firePresAbs, noFires)]
plotData <- plotData[, list(alphaDiv = 1/sum(relB^2)),
                     by = .(scenario, rep, year, pixelIndex, vegTypeCN, firePresAbs, noFires)]

## gamma-div - firePresAbs
plotData2 <- copy(summaryBurnCohortDataSpp)
plotData2[, sumB := sum(BiomassBySpecies, na.rm = TRUE),
          .(scenario, rep, year, firePresAbs)]
plotData2 <- plotData2[, list(relB = sum(BiomassBySpecies, na.rm = TRUE)/sumB),
                       by = .(scenario, rep, year, firePresAbs, speciesCode)]
plotData2 <- plotData2[, list(gammaDiv = 1/sum(relB^2)),
                       by = .(scenario, rep, year, firePresAbs)]

## beta-div  - firePresAbs
plotData2 <- plotData2[plotData, on = .(scenario, rep, year, firePresAbs)]
plotData2 <- plotData2[, list(betaDiv = gammaDiv * sum((1/.N) * (1/alphaDiv), na.rm = TRUE)),
                       by = .(scenario, rep, year, vegTypeCN, firePresAbs)]

plot35.2 <- ggplot(data = plotData2[vegTypeCN != "No veg."],
                   aes(x = year, y = betaDiv, colour = vegTypeCN)) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "line", size = 1) +
  stat_summary(aes(x = year, y = betaDiv, colour = "landscape"),
               fun = "mean", geom = "line", size = 1) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = cols2, labels = labs2) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  labs(title = "Avg. beta-diversity", y = "beta-div.") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 1.5))) +
  facet_grid(scenario ~ firePresAbs,
             labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels, firePresAbs = c("0" = "no fire", "1" = "fire")))
plot35.3 <- ggplot(data = plotData2[vegTypeCN != "No veg."],
                   aes(x = year, y = betaDiv, colour = vegTypeCN, linetype = scenario)) +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "line", size = 1) +
  stat_summary(aes(x = year, y = betaDiv, colour = "landscape"),
               fun = "mean", geom = "line", size = 1) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = cols2, labels = labs2) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = scenLinetype,
                        labels = scenLabels) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  labs(title = "Avg. beta-diversity", y = "beta-div.") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 1.5)))
```

```{r plot&savePlots18, echo = FALSE}
plotSave <- ggarrange(plot33.2,
                      plot35.2, common.legend = TRUE,
                      legend.grob = get_legend(plot33.2 + theme(legend.direction = "vertical")),
                      legend = "right",
                      ncol = 1,
                      labels = "auto", font.label = list(size = 20))
plotSave
ggsave(plot = plotSave, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "fixedPixels", "results_landscapeAlphaBetaScenarioVegType.tiff"),
       width = 12, height = 10)

plotSave <- ggarrange(plot33.3,
                      plot35.3, common.legend = TRUE,
                      legend.grob = get_legend(plot33.3),
                      legend = "bottom",
                      ncol = 1,
                      labels = "auto", font.label = list(size = 20))
plotSave
ggsave(plot = plotSave, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "fixedPixels", "results_landscapeAlphaBetaScenarioVegType2.tiff"),
       width = 8, height = 10)
gc()
```


## MAPS - veg type (dominant species)
```{r mapPlots, cache = FALSE}
## MAPS ------------------------
## dominant species - to deal with reps we need to reclassify the stands after averaging across reps.
plotData <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[year %in% c(startYear, endYear), 
                                  list(B = mean(B, na.rm = TRUE),
                                       age =  as.numeric(sum(age * (B/100), na.rm = TRUE) /
                                                           sum((B/100), na.rm = TRUE))),
                                  by = .(year, scenario, pixelIndex, speciesCode, firePresAbs)]

plotData <- lapply(split(plotData[B > 0], by = c("scenario", "year")), vegTypeGenerator,
                   vegLeadingProportion = 0, sppEquiv = preSimList$sppEquiv,
                   sppEquivCol = params(preSimList)$Biomass_borealDataPrep$sppEquivCol,
                   pixelGroupColName = "pixelIndex", doAssertion = FALSE)  ## turn assertions off so that the algorythm choice is based on table size
plotData <- rbindlist(plotData, use.names = TRUE)
setnames(plotData, "leading", "vegType")

plotData[, vegType := as.numeric(factor(vegType))]

vegTypeStk <- lapply(split(plotData, by =  c("scenario", "year")), function(DT, RTM) {
  rasVeg <- RTM
  rasVeg[] <- NA
  rasVeg[DT$pixelIndex] <- DT$vegType
  rasVeg
}, RTM = preSimList$rasterToMatch)
vegTypeStk <- stack(vegTypeStk)

myCompareRaster <- function(x, y) compareRaster(x, y, values = TRUE)
areEqual <- Reduce(myCompareRaster, as.list(vegTypeStk[[grep(startYear, names(vegTypeStk), value = TRUE)]]))
if (areEqual) {
  layers2Keep <- c(grep(startYear, names(vegTypeStk), value = TRUE)[1], 
                   grep(startYear, names(vegTypeStk), invert = TRUE, value = TRUE))
  vegTypeStk <- vegTypeStk[[layers2Keep]]
  names(vegTypeStk) <- sub(".*2011", "startYear", names(vegTypeStk))
} else {
  stop("initial veg type raster not identical across scenarios")
}

ageStk <- lapply(split(plotData[year == endYear], by = "scenario"), function(DT, RTM) {
  rasVeg <- RTM
  rasVeg[] <- NA
  rasVeg[DT$pixelIndex] <- DT$age
  rasVeg
}, RTM = preSimList$rasterToMatch)
ageStk <- stack(ageStk)

## vegetation type
rasData <- data.table(vals = getValues(vegTypeStk), coordinates(vegTypeStk))
rasData <- melt(rasData, id.vars = c("x", "y"))
rasData$variable <- sub("vals.", "", rasData$variable)
rasData[variable == "startYear", variable := startYear]

rm(vegTypeStk)
amc::.gc()

plotMap2 <- ggplot() +
  layer_spatial(data = preSimList$studyArea, col = "black",
                fill = "transparent") +
  geom_raster(data = rasData,
              mapping = aes(x, y, fill = as.factor(value))) +
  annotation_north_arrow(style = north_arrow_minimal,
                         height = unit(1, "cm"), width = unit(1, "cm"),
                         location = "tr", which_north = "true") +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16) +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 0, r = 0, b = 0, l = 0), legend.title = element_blank()) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = vegTypeColours, labels = vegTypeLabels,
                    na.translate = FALSE) +
  labs(x = "longitude", y = "latitude") +
  facet_wrap(~ variable)

rasData2 <- rasData2 <- rasData[variable != startYear & !is.na(value)]
rasData2$variable <- sub(paste0(".", endYear), "", rasData2$variable, fixed = TRUE)
plotMap2hist <- ggplot(rasData2) +
  geom_bar(aes(x = as.factor(value), fill = as.factor(value),
               alpha = variable == "PM"), position = "dodge") +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16) +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 0, r = 0, b = 0, l = 0), legend.title = element_blank(),
        axis.title.x = element_blank()) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = vegTypeColours, labels = vegTypeLabels,
                    na.translate = FALSE) +
  scale_alpha_manual(labels = c("TRUE" = "PM", "FALSE" = "noPM"),
                     values = c("TRUE" = 1, "FALSE" = 0.6)) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = vegTypeLabels) +
  guides(alpha = guide_legend(nrow = 2)) +
  labs(y = "no. pixels")

## age
rasData <- data.table(vals = getValues(ageStk), coordinates(ageStk))
rasData <- rasData[!is.na(vals.noPM)]
rasData[, delta := vals.noPM - vals.PM]
rasData <- melt(rasData, id.vars = c("x", "y", "delta"))
rasData$variable <- sub("vals.", "", rasData$variable)

rm(ageStk)
amc::.gc()

plotMap3 <- ggplot() +
  layer_spatial(data = preSimList$studyArea, col = "black",
                fill = "transparent") +
  geom_raster(data = rasData,
              mapping = aes(x, y, fill = value)) +
  annotation_north_arrow(style = north_arrow_minimal,
                         height = unit(1, "cm"), width = unit(1, "cm"),
                         location = "tr", which_north = "true") +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16) +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 0, r = 0, b = 0, l = 0)) +
  scale_fill_distiller(palette = "Greens", na.value = "transparent",
                       direction = 1) +
  labs(x = "longitude", y = "latitude", fill = "age") +
  facet_wrap(~ variable)

plotMap3hist <- ggplot(rasData[!is.na(value)]) +
  geom_density(aes(x = value, fill = variable, alpha = variable)) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16) +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 0, r = 0, b = 0, l = 0), legend.title = element_blank()) +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("PM" = 0.6, "noPM" = 1), guide = "none") +
  labs(y = "density", x = "age (years)")

## delta plot
plotMap3.2 <- ggplot() +
  layer_spatial(data = preSimList$studyArea, col = "black",
                fill = "grey85") +
  geom_raster(data = rasData,
              mapping = aes(x, y, fill = delta)) +
  annotation_north_arrow(style = north_arrow_minimal,
                         height = unit(1, "cm"), width = unit(1, "cm"),
                         location = "tr", which_north = "true") +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16) +
  scale_fill_distiller(palette = "RdBu", direction = 1,
                       na.value = "transparent") +
  labs(x = "longitude", y = "latitude", fill = expression(paste(Delta, "age")))

rm(rasData)
amc::.gc()
```

```{r plot&savePlots19, echo = FALSE}
plotSave <- ggarrange(plotMap1 + theme(legend.position = "right"),
                      plotMap1hist +
                        theme(legend.position = c(0.7, 0.95), legend.justification = c("left", "top")),
                      ncol = 1, heights = c(2,1), widths = c(0.98, 1))
plotSave
ggsave(plot = plotSave, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "results_avgAlphaDivMap.tiff"),
       width = 8, height = 12)

plotSave <- ggarrange(plotMap2 + theme(legend.position = "none"),
                      plotMap3 + theme(legend.position = "right"),
                      plotMap2hist + theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), legend.position = "none") +
                        guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 2), alpha = guide_legend(nrow = 2)),
                      plotMap3hist + theme(legend.position = c(0.95, 0.95),
                                           legend.justification = c("right", "top")),
                      get_legend(plotMap2hist),
                      ncol = 2, nrow = 3, heights = c(1,0.3,0.1),
                      font.label = list(size = 24), labels = c("a", "b"),
                      widths = c(1, 0.9), align = "hv")

plotSave
ggsave(plot = plotSave, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "results_avgVegTypeAgeMap.tiff"),
       width = 18, height = 12)

plotSave <- ggarrange(plotMap1.2 + theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
                        guides(fill = guide_colorbar(title.position = "top", barwidth = 10)),
                      plotMap3.2 + theme(legend.position = "bottom",
                                         axis.text.y = element_blank(), axis.title.y = element_blank()) +
                        guides(fill = guide_colorbar(title.position = "top", barwidth = 10)),
                      ncol = 2, nrow = 1,
                      labels = c("a", "b", ""), font.label = list(size = 20))
plotSave
ggsave(plot = plotSave, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "results_deltaAvgAgeAlphaMap.tiff"),
       width = 8, height = 8)

rm(plotMap1, plotMap1hist, plotMap1.2, plotMap2, plotMap2hist, plotMap3, plotMap3hist, plotMap3.2)
gc()
```

## MAPS - veg type 
It takes a long time to reclassify pixels into Cameron's functional veg. types, so instead of taking the average B across reps and reclassifying, I'll take the veg type that was more common across reps (per pixel)
```{r mapPlots2, cache = FALSE}
## MAPS ------------------------
## dominant species - to deal with reps we need to reclassify the stands after averaging across reps.
plotData <- allPixelCohortDataMnt[year %in% c(startYear, endYear), 
                                  list(vegTypeCN = names(which.max(table(vegTypeCN)))),
                                  by = .(year, scenario, pixelIndex, firePresAbs)]

plotData[, vegTypeCNnum := as.numeric(factor(vegTypeCN))]

vegTypeCNStk <- lapply(split(plotData, by =  c("scenario", "year")), function(DT, RTM) {
  rasVeg <- RTM
  rasVeg[] <- NA
  rasVeg[DT$pixelIndex] <- DT$vegTypeCN
  rasVeg
}, RTM = preSimList$rasterToMatch)
vegTypeCNStk <- stack(vegTypeCNStk)

myCompareRaster <- function(x, y) compareRaster(x, y, values = TRUE)
areEqual <- Reduce(myCompareRaster, as.list(vegTypeCNStk[[grep(startYear, names(vegTypeCNStk), value = TRUE)]]))
if (areEqual) {
  layers2Keep <- c(grep(startYear, names(vegTypeCNStk), value = TRUE)[1], 
                   grep(startYear, names(vegTypeCNStk), invert = TRUE, value = TRUE))
  vegTypeCNStk <- vegTypeCNStk[[layers2Keep]]
  names(vegTypeCNStk) <- sub(".*2011", "startYear", names(vegTypeCNStk))
} else {
  stop("initial veg type raster not identical across scenarios")
}

rasData <- data.table(vals = getValues(vegTypeCNStk), coordinates(vegTypeCNStk))
rasData <- melt(rasData, id.vars = c("x", "y"))
rasData$variable <- sub("vals.", "", rasData$variable)
rasData[variable == "startYear", variable := startYear]

rm(vegTypeCNStk)
amc::.gc()

plotMap4 <- ggplot() +
  layer_spatial(data = preSimList$studyArea, col = "black",
                fill = "transparent") +
  geom_raster(data = rasData,
              mapping = aes(x, y, fill = as.factor(value))) +
  annotation_north_arrow(style = north_arrow_minimal,
                         height = unit(1, "cm"), width = unit(1, "cm"),
                         location = "tr", which_north = "true") +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16) +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 0, r = 0, b = 0, l = 0), legend.title = element_blank()) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = vegTypeCNColours, labels = vegTypeCNLabels,
                    na.translate = FALSE) +
  labs(x = "longitude", y = "latitude") +
  facet_wrap(~ variable)

rasData2 <- rasData[variable != startYear & !is.na(value)]
rasData2$variable <- sub(paste0(".", endYear), "", rasData2$variable, fixed = TRUE)
plotMap4hist <- ggplot(rasData2) +
  geom_bar(aes(x = as.factor(value), fill = as.factor(value),
               alpha = variable == "PM"), position = "dodge") +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 0, r = 0, b = 0, l = 0), legend.title = element_blank(),
        axis.title.x = element_blank()) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = vegTypeCNColours, labels = vegTypeCNLabels,
                    na.translate = FALSE) +
  scale_alpha_manual(labels = c("TRUE" = "PM", "FALSE" = "noPM"),
                     values = c("TRUE" = 1, "FALSE" = 0.6)) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = vegTypeCNLabels) +
  guides(alpha = guide_legend(nrow = 2)) +
  labs(y = "no. pixels")

```

```{r plot&savePlots20, echo = FALSE}
plotSave <- ggarrange(plotMap4 + theme(legend.position = "none"),
                      plotMap4hist + theme(legend.position = "none"),
                      legend.grob = get_legend(plotMap4hist + theme(legend.direction = "vertical", legend.box = "vertical")), 
                      legend = "right",
                      ncol = 1, heights = c(1,0.6), widths = c(0.98, 1))
plotSave
ggsave(plot = plotSave, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "results_commonVegTypeCNMap.tiff"),
       width = 12, height = 12)

rm(plotMap4, plotMap4hist)
gc()
```

## MAPS - fire attributes 
Averaged across reps
```{r mapPlots_fireAttr, cache = FALSE}
## MAPS ------------------------
## dominant species - to deal with reps we need to reclassify the stands after averaging across reps.
plotData <- summaryFireAttributes[, list(meanFreq  = mean(meanFreq, na.rm = TRUE),
                                         meanPatchS = mean(meanPatchS, na.rm = TRUE),
                                         meanSevB = mean(meanSevB, na.rm = TRUE)),
                                  by = .(scenario, pixelIndex)]
## log severity
plotData$meanSevB <- log(plotData$meanSevB + 1)

plotData <- melt(plotData, id.vars = c("scenario", "pixelIndex"))

fireAttrStk <- lapply(split(plotData, by = c("scenario", "variable")), function(DT, RTM) {
  rasVeg <- RTM
  rasVeg[] <- NA
  rasVeg[DT$pixelIndex] <- DT$value
  rasVeg
}, RTM = preSimList$rasterToMatch)
fireAttrStk <- stack(fireAttrStk)

names(fireAttrStk) <- sub("^PM.", "PM - ", names(fireAttrStk))
names(fireAttrStk) <- sub("^noPM.", "no PM - ", names(fireAttrStk))
names(fireAttrStk) <- sub("meanFreq", "mean interval", names(fireAttrStk))
names(fireAttrStk) <- sub("meanPatchS", "mean patch size", names(fireAttrStk))
names(fireAttrStk) <- sub("meanSevB", "mean severity", names(fireAttrStk))
fireAttrStk <- fireAttrStk[[order(names(fireAttrStk))]]

fireAttrStk <- terra::rast(fireAttrStk)
tiff(file.path(figOutputPath, "results_fireAttribMaps.tiff"), width = 12, height = 8, units = "in",
     res = 300)
terra::plot(fireAttrStk, cex = 2, xlab = "longitude", ylab = "latitude",
            col = colorRampPalette(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(9, "YlOrRd"))(30),
            pax = list(cex.axis = 1.2), cex.lab = 1.5,
            mar = c(4.1, 4.1, 3.1, 6.5), plg = list(cex = 1.5), 
            fun = function() terra::plot(terra::vect(preSimList$studyArea), add = TRUE))
dev.off()
```

## TOPOGRAPHY AND CLIMATE PER VEGETATION TYPE (functional veg types)
Exploring topography and climate differences between pixels of different vegetation types, where vegetation types were classified at the beginning of the simulation
```{r topoClimVegType, cache = FALSE}
## TOPOGRAPHY --------------------------
rm(plotData, plotData2)
amc::.gc()
pixelIDs <- unique(allPixelCohortDataMnt[year == startYear, .(vegTypeCN, pixelIndex)])  

slopeRas <- raster(file.path(simPaths$inputPath, "slopeRas.tif"))
aspectRas <- raster(file.path(simPaths$inputPath, "aspectRas.tif"))
elevRas <- raster(file.path(simPaths$inputPath, "DEMRas_38892a6620545dfa.tif"))

topoData <- data.table(pixelIndex = 1:ncell(slopeRas), 
                       Slope = getValues(slopeRas),
                       Aspect = getValues(aspectRas),
                       Elevation = getValues(elevRas))
plotData <- topoData[pixelIDs, on = "pixelIndex"]
plotData <- melt(plotData, measure.vars = c("Elevation", "Slope", "Aspect"))

facetLabs <- c("Elevation" = "Elevation\n(m a.s.l.)", "Slope" = "Slope (%)", "Aspect" = "Aspect\n(degrees)")
plot45 <- ggplot(data = plotData, aes(x = vegTypeCN, y = value, fill = vegTypeCN)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = vegTypeCNLabels) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = vegTypeCNColours, labels = vegTypeCNLabels) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom",  x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted"),
        strip.placement = "outside", strip.background = element_blank(), strip.text = element_text(size = 16)) +
  labs(title = "Topography", y = "", x = "") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 1.5))) +
  facet_wrap( ~ variable, scales = "free_y", labeller = labeller(variable = facetLabs),
              strip.position = "left", ncol = 2)

## add pixelIDs to weather data
pixelIDsRas <- preSimList$rasterToMatch
pixelIDsRas[] <- 1:ncell(pixelIDsRas)
pixelIDsRas[!pixelIDsRas[] %in% pixelIDs$pixelIndex] <- NA

weatherData <- preSimList$weatherData
weatherData <- st_transform(weatherData, crs = crs(pixelIDsRas))
weatherData <- cbind(weatherData, st_drop_geometry(st_extract(st_as_stars(pixelIDsRas), at = weatherData)))

## drop geometry and NAs and add vegTypes
weatherData <- as.data.table(st_drop_geometry(weatherData))
setnames(weatherData, "rasterToMatchLarge", "pixelIndex")
weatherData <- weatherData[!is.na(pixelIndex)]
weatherData <- weatherData[pixelIDs, on = "pixelIndex", nomatch = 0]
setnames(weatherData, c("temperature", "relativeHumidity", "windSpeed", "precipitation"),
         c("Temperature", "Rel. humidity", "Wind speed", "Precipitation"))

plotData <- melt(weatherData, measure.vars = c("Temperature", "Rel. humidity", "Wind speed", "Precipitation"))

facetLabs <- c("Temperature" = "Temperature\n(centigrade)", "Rel. humidity" = "Rel. humidity\n(%)", 
               "Wind speed" = "Wind speed\n(km/h)", "Precipitation" = "Precipitation\n(mm)")
plot46 <- ggplot(data = plotData, aes(x = vegTypeCN, y = value, fill = vegTypeCN)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = vegTypeCNLabels) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = vegTypeCNColours, labels = vegTypeCNLabels) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom", x.text.angle = 45) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted"),
        strip.placement = "outside", strip.background = element_blank(), strip.text = element_text(size = 16)) +
  labs(title = "Climate", y = "", x = "") +
  facet_wrap( ~ variable, scales = "free_y", labeller = labeller(variable = facetLabs),
              strip.position = "left")
```

```{r plot&savePlots22, echo = FALSE}
plotSave <- plot_grid(
  plot_grid(plot45 + theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), legend.position = "none"),
            plot46 + theme(legend.position = "none"), 
            rel_heights = c(0.7, 1), ncol = 1, align = "v", axis = "l",
            labels = "auto", label_size = 20),
  get_legend(plot45 + theme(legend.direction = "vertical")),
  ncol = 2, rel_widths = c(1, 0.2))

plotSave
ggsave(plot = plotSave, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "fixedPixels", "topoClim_vegTypesCN.tiff"),
       width = 12, height = 10)
```


## FIRE ATTRIBUTES BY PYRODIVERSITY LEVEL
```{r fireAttriPyro}
tempData <- allHVData[year == end(preSimList),
                      .(HVtype, HV_noPM, HV_PM, rep, repHV, vegType)]
tempData <- melt.data.table(tempData, measure.vars = c("HV_noPM", "HV_PM"),
                            variable.name = "scenario", value.name = "Volume")
tempData$scenario <- sub("HV_", "", tempData$scenario)
tempData <- tempData[HVtype == "fireHV", list(Volume = mean(Volume, na.rm = TRUE)),
                     by = .(rep, vegType, scenario)]
setnames(tempData, "vegType", "vegTypeCN")

## add only landsdape level HV sizes 
plotData <- tempData[vegTypeCN == "landscape", .(scenario, rep, Volume)][summaryFireAttributes, on = .(scenario, rep)]
plotData <- melt(plotData, id.vars = c("scenario", "rep", "Volume", "pixelIndex", "vegTypeCN"))
plotData[variable %in% c("meanPatchS", "meanSevB"), value := log(value + 0.1)]

plot47 <- ggplot(plotData[variable != "meanSev"], aes(x = as.factor(round(log(Volume), 3)), 
                                                      y = value, 
                                                      fill = as.factor(round(log(Volume), 3)))) +
  geom_violin() + 
  theme_pubr(base_size = 16, legend = "bottom") +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted"),
        strip.placement = "outside", strip.background = element_blank(), strip.text = element_text(size = 16)) +
  labs(y = "", x = "pyrodiversity") +
  facet_grid(variable ~ scenario, scales = "free", switch = "y",
             labeller = labeller(scenario = scenLabels,
                                 variable = c(meanFreq = "Mean fire interval",
                                              meanSevB = "Mean severity",
                                              meanPatchS = "Mean patch size")))

## HERE

## relationship  between pyrodiversity and fire attributes -----------------
## join HV sizes with fire attributes
plotData <- allHVData[year == end(preSimList) & HVtype == "fireHV",
                      .(HV_noPM, HV_PM, rep, repHV, vegType)]
plotData[, vegType := factor(vegType, levels = names(vegTypeCNLabels))]
plotData <- melt.data.table(plotData, measure.vars = c("HV_noPM", "HV_PM"),
                            variable.name = "scenario", value.name = "Volume")
plotData[, scenario := sub("HV_", "", scenario)]
## center and scale volume as in model
plotData[, Volume := scale(log(Volume), center = TRUE, scale = FALSE),
          by = .(scenario, vegType)]

plotData2 <- plotData[vegType == "landscape"]
plotData2 <- summaryFireAttributes[plotData2, on = c("scenario", "rep"),
                                   allow.cartesian = TRUE]
plotData2[,vegTypeCN := NULL]

plotData <- plotData[vegType != "landscape"]
plotData <- summaryFireAttributes[plotData, on = c("vegTypeCN==vegType", "scenario", "rep"),
                                  allow.cartesian = TRUE]
setnames(plotData, "vegTypeCN", "vegType")
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)

plotData <- melt.data.table(plotData, measure.vars = c("meanFreq", "meanSevB", "meanPatchS"),
                            variable.name = "fireAttr", value.name = "value")
## calculate summary stats
plotData <- plotData[, as.list(summary(value)), by = .(scenario, rep, repHV, Volume, vegType, fireAttr)]


fireAttrPyroPlotFun <- function(plotData) {
  ggplot(plotData,
              aes(x = Volume, y = log(Mean + 1),
                  colour = vegType, linetype = scenario,
                  shape = scenario)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  stat_smooth(method = "gam", formula = y ~ s(x, k = 3), se = FALSE) +
  geom_hline(aes(yintercept = -Inf)) + ## to force axes lines.
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept = -Inf)) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  scale_shape_discrete(labels = scenLabels, name = "") +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = scenLinetype, labels = scenLabels) +
  scale_colour_manual(labels = vegTypeCNLabels, values = vegTypeCNColours, name = "") +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 12, margin = TRUE) +
  theme(legend.box = "horizontal", strip.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
        strip.background = element_blank(), strip.placement = "outside",
        panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey", size = 11/22, linetype = "dotted")) +
  labs(x = "Pyrodiversity", y = "", title = "") +
  facet_grid(fireAttr ~ vegType,
             scales = "free", switch = "y",
             labeller = labeller(vegType = vegTypeCNLabels,
                                 fireAttr = c("meanPatchS" = "Mean patch size\n(no. pixels)",
                                              "meanFreq" = "Mean fire interval",
                                              "meanSevB" = "Mean fire severity\n(biomass lost, ton/ha)")))
}

fireAttrPyroLandscapePlot <- fireAttrPyroPlotFun(plotData[vegType == "landscape"])
fireAttrPyroVegTypesPlot <- fireAttrPyroPlotFun(plotData[vegType != "landscape"])

plotSave <- ggarrange(fireAttrPyroVegTypesPlot,
                      fireAttrPyroLandscapePlot + labs(y = "", title = "") + theme(strip.text.y = element_blank()),
                      ncol = 2, nrow = 1, widths = c(1, 0.3), labels = "auto", label.y = 0.95,
                      common.legend = TRUE, legend = "bottom")
ggsave(plot = plotSave, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "fireAttrVsPyro.tiff"),
       width = 14, height = 8)



```

```{r plot&savePlots23, echo = FALSE}
plot47
ggsave(plot = plot47, filename = file.path(figOutputPath, "results_fireAttrLandscapePyrodiversity.tiff"),
       width = 14, height = 8)
```
